raw.About: Ar. Sharath H Aithal has done his Bachelors of Architecture (B.Arch.) from Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering and Masters of Architecture (M. Arch - Habitat Design) (First Class Distinction) from BMS College of Engineering. He is a National Award Winner for the Best Thesis conferred by National Institute of Advanced Studies in Architecture (NIASA), the Academic Unit of Council of Architecture (COA). He has been awarded the highest "S" grade by Indian Institute of Science for his Academic excellence in Environmental Management. He has represented the State in Intel Science Talent Discovery Fair at National level. He has over 11 years of professional experience with leading architects, planners & builders. He has 10 years of teaching experience. Specialized in sustainable, low carbon & energy efficient planning & architecture, he believes in integration of science with architecture is the way forward. He has been actively involved in Question paper setting, Valuation and Jury in various reputed universities/colleges in India. He is a practicing Architect and partner in an Architectural practice, involved in projects spread throughout Karnataka.

raw.About: Dr. Reshma S.V obtained her MSc degree from University of Mysore with Gold medal and second rank, MPhil degree from Mangalore University and PhD from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum.. She was the recipient of K. Narayanan Gold Medal in MSc Botany, University of Mysore (1994), K. Narayanan Cash Prize for highest score in II MSc Botany, University of Mysore (1994) and 2nd rank holder in M.Sc Botany, University of Mysore (1994). She is qualified in SLET - Life Sciences - Masters Level (State Level Eligibility Test For Lectureship). She worked on the PhD research topic titled "Cloning, expression and characterization of select hypothetical proteins from Halobacterium and Bacillus Species". She has 25 years of teaching experience in Biotechnology & Botany and developed skills in life-science related areas by virtue of teaching and guiding students at both graduate and postgraduate levels. She has 1ed 7 papers in International/National journals and 3 books. Her areas of interest are Plant Biotechnology, Genetics & Molecular Biology, biodiversity conservation and Seed Technology. She is the Co-investigator of a DBT funded project on Production of TAGs from microalgae using photo-bioreactor intended for biodiesel production. She has provided technical assistance and guidance to students in Research & Development activities, higher studies and personality development. She has designed and conducted various faculty and student workshops. She is a Life member of Society for Biological Chemists and Life Member, Indian Science Congress Association, India.

raw.About: Dr. M.S.Dinesh is the Associate Professor, Department of Biotechnology (UG & PG Studies) at P E S University, Bangalore. He completed Ph.d., degree from Indian Institute of Horticultural Research (IIHR), Bangalore in the field of cell culture product as biopesticides and biofertilizers with the best thesis award from Indian Councial of Agricultural Research (ICAR) New Delhi. He has done his post doctural research programme at centre for sustainable technologies, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore in the field of therapeutic peptides from indigenous mesofauna awarded first place in the biopharmaceutics area by DBT-Government of India. He has completed his master degree in life sciences with first class from Bangalore University. He has 17 years of teaching and 20 years of research experience.He has handled many course subjects in the field of Biopharmaceuticals, Food Biotechnology, Agricultural Biotechnology, Animal Biotechnology, Environmental Biotechnology , Molecular biology and Genetic Engineering. He is recognized guide for PES University and VTU to guide M.Sc., (Engg.,) Research and Ph.D., students. He has 13 International, 04 national Journal publications, also 12 International 32 National conference publications secured many best research paper awards. He is in the edutorial board of Indian Journal of applied research, Korean National centre for research resource, Indo frech cell for organic waste management, Life member Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE), Society for Biological Chemistry (SBC), Association for advancement in Horticultural Ecosystem (AAPMHE), Indian Society for Soil Biology and Ecology (ISSBE). Selected as a trainee researcher by Biocon academy. Presented research innovations at Chung ang university, Seoul, Korea, Krakov, Poland. He has awarded sponcered research projects in the field of bippharmaceuitcs by VTU, RGUHS, ISHWM, AICTE MDROB.

Down stream process technolo PG Courses: Computational Biology, Systems Biology, DNA chips & Micro array Data Analysis, Health informatics, Neuroinformatics, Essential Bioinformatics Laboratory, Biomolecular Modeling & Simulation Laboratory, Cancer Biology, Regenerative Medicine 2 Credit courses: Applications in systems biology, Cell Designer for Biochemical Modeling, Data analytics for Biology, Environmental Studies and Life Sciences | Active Projects: Molecular interaction studies for predicting inhibitory activity of anticancer inhibitors Image analysis to assess cellular health Systems biology of Neurodegenerative Disorder In silico vaccine design Agent based modeling to study infection In silico modeling of neurodegenerative disease pathway Network pharmacology | Responsibilities: Project Coordinator ( UG & PG Projects)-PESIT & PESU Doctoral Committee Member: Sir MVIT Board of Examiners, DSCE, Bangalore Doctoral Committee Member: PESU Project Coordinator ( UG & PG Projects)-PESIT & PESU Project Coordinator ( PG Projects)-PESIT Prakalpa Coordinator (PESIT) Web Coordinator( PESIT) | Bio: Dr. Jhinuk Chatterjee obtained her Ph.D. in Biotechnology from Department of Life Sciences & Biotechnology from Jadavpur University , Kolkata. Her major area of research is Computational Biology, Systems Biology, Cellular Imaging and Computational Immunology. University merit scholarship and academic excellence award were awarded to her during graduation and post graduation studies. Her PhD work was focused on analyzing antigenic variations in human spermatozoa and drug interaction. After completion of her PhD she worked as full time post doctoral researcher in Bioinformatics Center, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. In Indian institute of Science she has worked on in silico analysis of putative drug targets in Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv. raw.About: Dr. Jhinuk Chatterjee obtained her Ph.D. in Biotechnology from Department of Life Sciences & Biotechnology from Jadavpur University , Kolkata. Her major area of research is Computational Biology, Systems Biology, Cellular Imaging and Computational Immunology. University merit scholarship and academic excellence award were awarded to her during graduation and post graduation studies. Her PhD work was focused on analyzing antigenic variations in human spermatozoa and drug interaction. After completion of her PhD she worked as full time post doctoral researcher in Bioinformatics Center, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. In Indian institute of Science she has worked on in silico analysis of putative drug targets in Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv. Dr Jhinuk has reviewed papers from various journals like Computers in Biology and Medicine, Current Bioinformatics, Environmental Toxicology & Pharmacology, Aspects of Molecular Medicine, Medicine in Omics, Briefings in Bioinformatics, Nature Scientific Reports etc. She has published research papers in various journals of good repute. She has guided several UG and PG students for their projects. She has also guided PhD students who worked on analyzing influence of micro-environment on cells and analyzing inhibitory activity of anticancer inhibitors.

Having diversified background in Science, Biotechnology and Microbiology with management experience. 27 years of in-depth advanced research, consulting, teaching expertise and diverse work experiences. CORE COMPETENCIES - Creative problem solving - Cross-functional teams orientation - Motivator and guide with analytical and research depth to align scientific efficiencies with organization goals - Program development - Product development and Management - Continuous improvement - Strategic partnership relations - Team building and traini... | Career History: Research Associate, IIT Delhi, March 1996 - Aug 1996 Visiting Professor, Department of Biotechnology, PES College, Bangalore, Jan 2009 - July 2009 Assistant Professor-Department of Biotechnology, PESIT, Bangalore, Aug 2009 - Continuing Assistant Professor- Department of Biotechnology, PES University, 2016 - Continuing Visiting Professor- Biotechnology & Microbiology, City College,Bangalore, 2007 -... | Success: SCIRE BIOTECHNOLOGIST AWARD 2019 by SCIRE SCIENCE PVT LTD., 2019 Distinguished Researcher Award of the Year in Microbiology by, World Research Peace Award 2019 powered by RULA Awards, 2019 Advisory Board member for SciCon Series CTBio 2018, 3rd International Conference on "In Sync- With Next Generation Biosciences (INGB)", Goa, India, 6-8, November 2019. raw.About: Growth-oriented researcher and a teacher leveraging increasing responsibilities and accountability to contribute to the fulfilment of educational and research institutions that foster the advancement of science for the betterment of environment and society. Having diversified background in Science, Biotechnology and Microbiology with management experience. 27 years of in-depth advanced research, consulting, teaching expertise and diverse work experiences. CORE COMPETENCIES - Creative problem solving - Cross-functional teams orientation - Motivator and guide with analytical and research depth to align scientific efficiencies with organization goals - Program development - Product development and Management - Continuous improvement - Strategic partnership relations - Team building and training

name: Dr. S V Venkatesh
text: Name: Dr. S V Venkatesh | Department: Civil Engineering | Campus: RR | Research: Earthquake Engineering Masonry Structures Ferrocement Foam Concrete Bacteria Concrete | Expertise/Teaching: Reinforced Cement Concrete Strength of Materials / Mechanics of Materials Estimating and Costing Elements of Civil Engineering Engineering Mechanics - 2D & 3D Engineering Graphics Material testing laboratory Fluid mechanics and machines laboratory CAD Laboratory Detailing of RC Structural Elements Detailing of Steel Structures Building planning and drawing | Active Projects: Foam Concrete for Roofing Element | Responsibilities: Core committee member of Community development program for I year students. Head, Department of Civil Engineering, PESIT, Bangalore. In-charge Head, Department of Civil Engineering, PESIT, Bangalore. Anchor teacher for engineering mechanics. Faculty in-charge for Material Testing Laboratory. Time-table officer Coordinator for VTU Examination Coordinator: One-day Workshop on 'Social Sensitization of Technology'. Process coordinator. Member of Community Development Program. Chairperson - Class committee for III sem (Autonomous Scheme) In-charge of VTU EDUSAT program. | Bio: Dr S V Venkatesh is currently working as Professor, Civil Engineering, Department of S & H, PES University, RR Campus, Bangalore. He obtained his Ph.D. in Civil Engineering, Master of Engineering in Structural Engineering and Bachelor of Engineering in Civil Engineering from Bangalore University. He has about 26 years of teaching and research experience. His research interests are Earthquake Engineering, Masonry structures, Concrete Technology etc. He has published about 50 papers in Journals and conferences. He has guided several M.Tech and B.Tech Projects. He has guided three candidates for Ph.D. He is guiding two candidates for Ph.D. He is serving as the chairperson of Works advisory committee of Indian Statistical institute, Bangalore. | Career History: Professor, PESU, 2017 - 2018 Professor, PESIT, 2016 - 2017 Prof. and Head, PESIT, 2014 - 2016 Associate Professor, In-charge Head, PESIT, 2013 - 2014 Assistant Professor, PESIT, 2006 - 2013 Lecturer, PESIT, 1999 - 2006 Visiting faculty, PESIT, 1998 - 1999 Professor & Chairperson, PESU, 2018 - 2024 Professor, PESU, 2024 - Till date | Success: College topper in First year diploma Civil, Board of Technical College topper in III sem BE Civil, University examination. First position in National level technical paper presentation contest (Stapana 2007), VNR Vignana jyothi Institute of Engineering & Technology. Hyderabad. Co-Chair for two technical sessions in International conference on Advances in Civil Engineering (ACE - 2011) held at KL University, Koneru Lakshmaiah Education Foundation, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, INDIA. Winners of leather ball Staff Cricket tournament conducted by BHS First Grade College. Winners of tennis ball Staff Cricket tournament conducted by RV College of Engineering. Runners up tennis ball Staff Cricket tournament conducted by HKBK College of Engineering Sponsored by VTU. Co-Chair for technical sessions at REDECON 2016 International conference on Tall Structures - Evolution and innovation, November 9 - 12 2016, ACCE (India), Bengaluru Chapter, at Nimhans Conventional center, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. raw.About: Dr S V Venkatesh is currently working as Professor, Civil Engineering, Department of S & H, PES University, RR Campus, Bangalore. He obtained his Ph.D. in Civil Engineering, Master of Engineering in Structural Engineering and Bachelor of Engineering in Civil Engineering from Bangalore University. He has about 26 years of teaching and research experience. His research interests are Earthquake Engineering, Masonry structures, Concrete Technology etc. He has published about 50 papers in Journals and conferences. He has guided several M.Tech and B.Tech Projects. He has guided three candidates for Ph.D. He is guiding two candidates for Ph.D. He is serving as the chairperson of Works advisory committee of Indian Statistical institute, Bangalore.

raw.title:
Chairperson, 
                                                        
                                                        Director of Cloud Computing & Big Data (CCBD), Centre for Data Sciences & Applied Machine Learning (CDSAML)
raw.Education: B.E, UVCE, Bangalore University, 1989 M. Tech, Mysore University, 1993 'C' Level, DOEACC (New Delhi), 2000 Ph.D, VTU, 2013
raw.Experience: Chairperson and Professor & Head, CSE & ISE, PES University (UG & PG Studies) & PES Institute of Technology, 2019 - Till Date Chairperson & Head, CSE & ISE, PES University (UG Studies) & PES Institute of Technology, 2017 - 2019 Professor and Head, ISE, PES Institute of Technology, 2002 - 2017 Assistant Professor, PES Institute of Technology, 1999 - 2002 Lecturer, MSRIT, 1993 - 1999 Lecturer, BMS, 1989 - 1991
raw.Achievements: First Rank in M.Tech ACM best paper award for Women in Computing Awarded Best Paper for Cloud Image Prior: Single Image Cloud Removal at International Conference on Innovative Computing and Communication ICICC-2021
raw.Teaching: Under Graduate Courses: Data Structures, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Operating Systems, Database Management Systems, Data Communication, Computer Networks, Management Information System, Computer Architecture and Organization, Microprocessor, Digital Design, Electronics Circuits, System Programming, UNIX System Programming, UNIX Shell Programming, COBOL, Problem Solving with 'C', OOP with C Post Graduate Courses: Digital Image Processing, Cloud Computing Special Topics: Computational Photography, Frameworks, Image Processing and Computer Vision, Matlab, OpenCv, Machine Learning.
raw.Responsibilities: Chairperson, Department of Computer Science and Engineering (UG Studies), P E S University Professor & Head, Department of CSE and Department of ISE, P E S Institute of Technology P E S University - BOS Member CMR (MCA) - BOS Member Dr. AIT - BOS Member
raw.Research Interest: Machine Learning Natural Language Processing Cyber Forensics Computer Vision and Image Processing

raw.About: Director of Cloud Computing & Big Data (CCBD), Centre for Data Sciences & Applied Machine Learning (CDSAML). She completed her Bachelor's degree from UVCE, Bangalore University in 1989, Master's degree from Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, Mysore University in 1993. She secured the First rank in the university in her M. Tech course. She completed the 'C' level course from DOEACC and holds a Ph.D in the domain of Face Recognition from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU). She has 28 years of teaching experience and 15 years of research experience. She has several journal articles, national and international conference publications to her credit. She has taught a plethora of courses and has guided several projects and research activities at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. She is a member of BOS of several organizations, reviewer of conferences and member of many technical committees. Dr. Shylaja is heading two centers at P E S University, the Center for Data Sciences and Applied Machine Learning (CDSAML) and the Huawei Innovation Lab, facilitating research and internship opportunities for students and faculty members. Her research areas include Image Processing, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning.

raw.About: Prof. Nitin V. Pujari is a distinguished academic and administrator, currently serving as the Dean of the Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) at PES University, Bengaluru. Since joining PES in 1991, Professor Pujari has played a vital role in the institution’s academic vision, contributing more than three decades of expertise in teaching, leadership, and research His career trajectory at PES University reflects steady advancement and broad impact. He began as a lecturer in 1991, progressing to Assistant Professor and Head of the Department by 1997. By 2003, he became Professor and Head, and later served as Chairperson of both the undergraduate and postgraduate Computer Science Engineering (CSE) departments. Since 2019, he has led the IQAC, fostering a culture of continuous academic improvement and institutional effectiveness As Dean, he has Conducted and/or Participated in innumerable initiatives to enhance teaching quality, student learning outcomes, and organizational best practices through robust quality assurance frameworks. Nitin V. Pujari’s research interests include Education Data Mining, Learning Analytics, Taxonomy in Education, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Operating Systems. His work is reflected in numerous scholarly publications, including journal articles and conference proceedings that explore practical applications of machine learning and analytics in education. Noteworthy publications cover diverse areas, such as automated question bank generation, sign language recognition, cloud computing evangelism, and neural network-based product recognition He has guided a host of student research and capstone projects, focusing on innovative problems like real-time video analysis, educational taxonomy, and social network-driven recommendation systems. As the Principal Resource Person for the PES-IBM Collaborative Program and leader of several AICTE-sponsored modernization projects, he has consistently bridged academic theory with practical implementation in both curriculum development and research In addition, Nitin V. Pujari is also an entrepreneur and founder of Ordell Ugo, a virtual entity framework established in 2012 to enhance the meta-cognitive skills of participating students at PES University. His dual role as innovator and mentor has enabled him to combine technical insights with pedagogical advancements, preparing students for emerging challenges in computer Science Nitin V. Pujari’s distinguished career is characterized by a commitment to excellence in education, innovation in learning analytics, and leadership in academic quality assurance. His holistic approach—spanning instruction, research, administration, and community service—continues to influence computer science education in India and inspire future generations of learners at PES University.

raw.About: Dr. Adithya Balasubramanyam holds a full-time Ph.D. degree from Chung-Ang University, South Korea in the area of Computer Graphics and Virtual Reality. His interests are in the area of Augmented and Virtual Reality, Digital Twins, System Simulations and Modeling. He has thought computer science engineering to undergrad students for 3 years at Jyothy Institute of Technology, Bangalore. He has more than 3+ years of industrial experience and has been rendering technical consultation as a freelancer for more than 10 years now. Currently, he is associated with the ISFCR and IoT research center at PESU. During his tenure in Schneider Electric as a Software Engineer, he has been recognized for his contribution to improvement in the performance and design of Schneider's products. Dr. Adithya has filed 4 patents, published extensively in top venues, and mentors both PhD. and undergraduate students. His recent State of the Art work includes the Digital Twin of the Human Heart and Human Gut. He has served as a jury member in Start-up Karnataka, Gov. Of Karnataka. Additionally, he co-founded Education Informal School Visits, promoting scientific literacy among underprivileged children—a testament to his commitment to societal impact..

raw.About: Dr. Ashok Kumar Patil holds a full-time Ph.D. in Computer Graphics and Virtual Reality from the Graduate School of Advanced Imaging Science, Multimedia, and Film (GSAIM), Chung-Ang University, Seoul, South Korea. He is currently a faculty member at PES University, Bengaluru, where he is associated with the Centre for Internet of Things (IoT) and leads the Mobility and Autonomous Systems (MARS) Lab (https://www.iot.pes.edu/mars). Dr. Patil's research spans the domains of Computer Graphics, Virtual Reality, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), automation in 3D reconstruction, and Autonomous Vehicles. He has over 11 years of active research experience, 2+ years of industry experience, and 3+ years of teaching experience, enabling him to bridge the gap between cutting-edge research, real-world applications, and student learning. His ongoing projects include developing precision landing algorithms for drones on dynamic platforms, autonomous navigation systems for mobile robots, and intelligent robotic arms for sketching and manipulation based on natural language inputs. Before joining PES University, Dr. Patil served as a Postdoctoral Researcher and Research Associate at the Virtual Environments Lab, Chung-Ang University. During his research tenure, he worked on several Korean government-funded projects and presented his work at reputed international conferences. He has also contributed as an editor and author to manuscripts published in high-impact international journals. At PES University, Dr. Patil is actively mentoring Ph.D. students, driving interdisciplinary research, collaborating with industry partners, and contributing to curriculum development in robotics and automation. His future research aims include impactful innovations in drone technology, autonomous systems, and immersive simulations.

She received her B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Kuvempu University and her M.Tech degree in Computer Networks and Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University. She obtained her Doctoral Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University and has over 25 years of teaching experience. Her current research interests include Natural Language Processing, Data Analytics, Pattern Recognition, and Image Processing. She has authored over 100 international papers and is a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education, MIR Labs, and IACSIT. raw.name: Dr. Mamatha H R
raw.title:
Professor, 
                                                        
                                                        Director
raw.Education: B.E, Bapuji Institute of Engineering and Technology,Kuvempu University, 1997 M.Tech, B.M.S.College of Engineering,Visvesvaraya Technological University, 2005 Ph.D, Visvesvaraya Technological University, 2014
raw.Experience: Lecturer, JSS Academy of Technical Education, 26.07.2001 - 18.02.2006 Lecturer, Bapuji Institute of Engineering & Technology (BIET),, 20.04.1998 - 22.02.1999 Assistant Professor, Department of ISE, PES Institute of Technology, 20.02.2006 - 30.11.2011 Lecturer, KS Institute of Technology, 09.04.2001 - 25.07.2001 Associate Professor, Department of ISE, PES Institute of Technology, 01.12.2011 - 30.04.2015 Professor, Department of ISE, PES Institute of Technology, 01.05.2015 - 31.03.2017 Professor, Department of CSE, PES University, 01.04.2017 - Till date Lecturer, UBDTCE, 01.03.1999 - 31.01.2001
raw.Additional Information: Mentored a project team (one among the top 30 teams across the world and top 3 in India) in the Windows Embedded Students Challenge Competition at Microsoft Campus, Redmond, Seattle, USA Chair person, HP-PESIT Relations Delegate at Deloitte Bridge program- Aligning Academia with Industry Analytics, Hyderabad Mentored a team (Secured 3rd place )in 2021 VizWiz Grand Challenge Workshop, The University of Texas at Austin, USA Mentor-Campus Connect Program-GE HealthCare DT Mentored a team for OpenNyAI Make-a-thon conducted by Agami. The emphasis of the make-a-thon was on enhancing the justice system in India using AI. The work on building a tool to find similar cases was awarded the Manupatra Prize for "Most innovative and out-of-the-box solution" along with a grant of Rs 50,000.
raw.Achievements: Excellent and consistent publication record, with 75+ international papers in peer reviewed conferences and journals with 253 citations ,h-index of 9 and i10-index of 7. One among the judges of Windows Embedded Students Challenge Competition-2005 held at Microsoft Campus, Redmond, Seattle, USA Received a Travel Grant of Rs.25,000 from VTU towards paper presentation in an International conference conducted in Kathmandu, Nepal. Received a Travel Grant of Rs.50,000 from PESIT towards paper presentation in an International conference conducted in Xiamen, China. Received a Research Grant of 6.78 lakhs from PES University towards building of Kannada Search Engine Mentored a team (Secured 3rd place )in 2021 VizWiz Grand Challenge Workshop, The University of Texas at Austin, USA Mentored a team for OpenNyAI Make-a-thon conducted by Agami. The emphasis of the make-a-thon was on enhancing the justice system in India using AI. The work on building a tool to find similar cases was awarded the Manupatra Prize for "Most innovative and out-of-the-box solution" along with a grant of Rs 50,000.
raw.Teaching: For UG: Statistics for Data Science, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Introduction to Computing Using Python, Problem Solving using C, Data communication, Data processing and file structures, Programming in COBOL, Programming in PASCAL, Computer fundamentals-FORTRAN and BASIC, Computer system design and architecture, Distributed Computing, Computer Networks, Microprocessors, Advanced For PG: Deep Learning Theory and Practices, Computer Systems and Performance Analysis, Advanced DBMS, Multimedia Communications, Software Testing, Database Security, Software Engineering, Database Management Systems Laboratory: COBOL lab, Computer Basic Skills lab, Microprocessor lab, Computer Graphics lab, Network programming lab, Microprocessor lab, DBMS lab, C programming lab, System Performance and Engineering lab, Java programming lab, Computer Technologies lab, System Software lab, Data Warehousing and Data Mining Lab
raw.Responsibilities: Professor and assisting department in various Administrative activities Board of Studies member Doctoral Committee Member for VTU and PESU Research Supervisor in VTU and PES University(Guiding 5 students) Faculty Advisor mentoring Chair person, HP-PESIT Relations. College Co-ordinator for ISTE Coordinator for Linux Campus club activity of IBM Member of the college audit committee Organized "Kriti-The Hobby Project Competition" at PESIT, Bangalore Organizing committee member of "Prakalpa-2009" a Project Competition held at PESIT, Bangalore Organizing committee member for ICMCBIR and ICEMC2 and various workshops, conferences, community development programmes and competitions. Co-ordinating various administrative activities like NBA, NAAC, TEQIP, Process,Autonomous, Time-Table, Test, Project ,Research , Examination, Student Academic Support Programme ,web updation and Pre-placement training activity Member of the various committees like Board of Studies, Audit, Anti-Ragging And Disciplinary, Girls Hostel Grievance Board of Studies member for Department of Information Science & Engineering ,RVCE and Department of Computer Science & Engineering ,Nagarjuna college of Engineering and Technology, Bangalore Technical Programme Committee member and Session-Chair for various International conferences. Co-chair, Center for Research in Healthcare Doctoral committee member of Global Academy of Technology , RV College of Engineering and Oxford College of Engineering,Bangalore Organizing Co-Chair of MMLA 2019 Program committee member of ACM International Symposium,Compute 2018,Chitkara University,Punjab Coordination of Recruitment Process Board of Studies member for Department of Information Science & Engineering ,BNMIT , Department of AI & ML ,DSCE, Department of Computer Science & Design ,DSATM, Bangalore
raw.Research Guidance: Research Supervisor in VTU and PES University(Guiding 5 students) Guided and guiding several academic and research projects, many of them leading to research publications.
raw.Research Interest: Pattern Recognition and Image Processing Data Analytics Speech and Video Processing Deep Learning Working on Low resource languages like Kannada Natural Language Processing Computer Vision
raw.Research Projects: Isolated Handwritten Kannada Character recognition Document Analysis of Handwritten Documents Microarray gene Analysis for Cancer Detection Fingerprint Recognition Nature Inspired Computing Medical Imaging(Diabetic retinopathy and Covid 19) Speech Emotion recognition Dialect recognition Visual Question Answering for visually impaired

raw.About: Dr. Mamatha H R is the Chairperson, Department of Computer Science and Engineering at P E S University, Bangalore. She received her B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Kuvempu University and her M.Tech degree in Computer Networks and Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University. She obtained her Doctoral Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University and has over 25 years of teaching experience. Her current research interests include Natural Language Processing, Data Analytics, Pattern Recognition, and Image Processing. She has authored over 100 international papers and is a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education, MIR Labs, and IACSIT. Dr. Mamatha is a reviewer for various international conferences and journals, and has mentored students for international competitions, including the 2006 Windows Embedded Students Challenge Competition held at Microsoft Campus, Redmond, Seattle, USA, and the 2021 VizWiz Grand Challenge Workshop at The University of Texas at Austin.

This effectively engages students and facilitate comprehensive understanding of complex engineering concepts. raw.About: Dr. D. Uma is a professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, PES University. She has over 25 years of association with P. E. S. Institutions. She has 27 years of teaching experience and 17 years of research experience. She obtained her Bachelor's degree from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu in 1993 and Master's degree from Bharathiar University in 1995. She has obtained her Doctoral degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum, Karnataka during 2011. She also obtained M. Tech. in Information Technology from Karnataka State Open University, Mysore, Karnataka during 2015. Her research areas include Data Science, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning and Natural Language Processing. She has several journal articles, national and international conference publications to her credit.

He is currently working as the Chief Time Table Officer of PES University, served as Time Table Officer of the department, Test Coordination, Examination coordin Conducted Faculty Development Program on Fundamentals of Machine Learning in association with Prof. Srikanth H R. | Bio: Mr. V R Badri Prasad has actively contributed in various activities of the Department. His areas of interest are Parallel and Distributed Computing, Computer Vision, Microprocessors, Computer Architecture, Data Structures and Algorithms. raw.About: Dr. Nagasundari S received Ph.D degree in the faculty of Information and Communication Engineering, Anna University, India. She is currently working as an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and associated with the Research Center for Information Security, Forensics and Cyber Resilience and Research Center for Internet of Things. She is a Member of Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers(IEEE), Member of Automotive Security Research Group(ASRG), Associate Member of Institution of Engineers, India, and Member of Cloud Security alliance, Bangalore Chapter. Her research interests include IoT Security and Cloud Security.

name: Dr. Radhika M. Hirannaiah
text: Name: Dr. Radhika M. Hirannaiah | Department: Computer Science | Campus: RR | Research: Computer Networking, SDN, 5G | Expertise/Teaching: Software Testing, Computer Networks, Computer Network Security, Introduction to 5G | Responsibilities: Research: Associated with ISFCR research center, Exploring 5G lab setup and its use cases. Course Anchor for Software Testing and Designing syllabus for Networking related courses | Bio: Dr. Radhika M. Hirannaiah is an Associate Professor at PES University (RR Campus) in Bangalore, India. She earned her PhD from Wichita State University in Kansas, USA, and brings over 10 years of industry experience in software development, testing, automation, and support for computer networking products. raw.About: Dr. Radhika M. Hirannaiah is an Associate Professor at PES University (RR Campus) in Bangalore, India. She earned her PhD from Wichita State University in Kansas, USA, and brings over 10 years of industry experience in software development, testing, automation, and support for computer networking products. She has held positions at prominent organizations, including Cisco, Palo Alto Networks, various startups, and in Linux Foundation open-source projects. She brings over six years of experience in teaching high school, undergraduate, and graduate-level courses, along with delivering virtual online training. Her research interests are centered on cutting-edge technologies, including software-defined networking (SDN), Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP), and 5G technology. She is committed to advancing knowledge in these fields and uses her extensive expertise to inspire and mentor her students in Network Security and 5G applications. She is a self-motivated and proactive team player, recognized for her versatility and excellent interpersonal skills.

raw.About: Yaswanth Narikamalli is an enthusiastic and dedicated academician with a strong foundation in both industry and teaching. He holds an M.Tech in Internet of Things from JNTUA. With prior experience as a Software Engineer at Yalamanchili Engineering Pvt. Ltd., Yaswanth transitioned into academia with a passion for shaping future technologists. He has been serving as an Assistant Professor since July 2023, teaching undergraduate students in areas such as Java, Internet of Things (IoT), Cloud Computing, Software Engineering, Open Source Technologies, and Database Management Systems. His teaching approach emphasizes practical learning, industry relevance, and student engagement. He actively mentors students through hands-on workshops and technical activities that bridge the gap between academia and industry. Yaswanth has actively contributed to research with publications indexed in Springer and Web of Science (WoS), reflecting his commitment to advancing knowledge in emerging technologies. His research interests primarily focus on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Science, with an emphasis on real-world applications. He is known for his positive attitude, curiosity, and commitment to continuous learning, making him a valuable contributor to the academic community.

raw.Responsibilities: Served as BOS member for Autonomous scheme of PES Institute of Technology. Was invited as Academic Expert for the conduction of practical exams of Mount Carmel College which is an autonomous institute under Bangalore University in the month of May, 2017. Member of the Academic Council ,VTU Nominee, for SDMCET, Dharwad for a period of 2 years from 2017-2019. Worked as moderator, valuer, external Deputy Chief for VTU, Bangalore University and Mysore University exams. Editor of Bi Annual Alumni Newsletter for a period of 4 Years from 2007-2011. Chaired a session on 'Information Retrieval' at the Third International Conference on Soft Computing and Pattern Recognition (SOCPAR-2011), held at Dalian, China. Chaired a session on 'Artificial Intelligence and Soft computing' at the Third International conference on Soft Computing, Artificial Intelligence and Applications (SCAI-13)', held at New Delhi, India Worked as Process coordinator for the department for a period of one year (2012-2013). PG coordinator for Visvesvaraya Technological University and PES University for a period of 1.5+ years from May 2015 to Mar 2017. Member of the Department advisory council Member for the Interview panel for PESIT and PES University. Reviewer for British Journal for Mathematica and Computer science, 2016. Reviewer for Asian Journal for Mathematics and Computer Science, 2017 Reviewer for Pre PhD Thesis of Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum. Reviewer for PhD thesis for University of Hyderabad in the year 2016 and 2017 Invited as Academic Expert for the conduction of the Exam of Bangalore University in the month of April ,2017 Invited as a guest speaker to deliver a talk on 'Internet of Things' , by St. Francis College, Electronic City, Bangalore in the month of April, 2017. Presently nominated to different doctoral committees of the Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum. Was on the board of interview panel for the promotion of scientists from DRDO, was invited as External Expert from the Dept of Defense in the Month of May 2017. Worked as Alumni Coordinator for PES institutions for a period of five years. Organized various workshops and National and International conferences at the Institute level. Was identified as the main coordinator for the conduction of one week workshop on 'Android Programming Skills' in association with Google and Visvesvaraya Technological University from 10th to 14th July, 2017. was invited as an external expert for the interview panel of KSSEM, Bangalore in the month of July,2017 Organized one day workshop on Intel Nervana on AI and its applications in association with Intel in the month of September, 2017. was invited as the chief guest and the judge for the one day national level seminar on digital connectivity at St Francis College, Bangalore on September 15th, 2017. was featured in a news article in The Indian Express, July 8th Edition, for the significant contribution in the field of Kannada NLP. raw.About: Description :has an extensive academic experience of 28+ years in the best engineering colleges of Mysore university, Bangalore University and VTU. Was a member of Local Inquiry Committee (LIC) of VTU during 2017. Was nominated by the VTU as an Academic Council member ( VTU Nominee) for SDM College of Engineering and Technology, Dharwad for a period of 2 years. Nominated as an External Expert for the Recruitment and Assessment Committee for the Senior scientists of DRDO. Invited as an Academic Expert for Bangalore University Exams, Invited as Guest speaker for different colleges. Recognized research supervisor of the VTU and PES University. Chaired technical sessions on Information Retrieval at prestigious conferences held in India, USA and China. Presented papers at the flagship conferences in the US and China. Served as member for BOS and Department Curriculum Committee. Was deputed as external deputy chief and moderator for VTU exams. Panel member for PhD comprehensive exams and a member for doctoral committee for PES University and VTU. Has good research track record with 84 publications in the international conferences and journals of good repute. Has mentored students for their undergrad, postgrad projects.One research Scholar successfully completed his PhD degree. Currently guiding 5 research scholars for their PhD degree.

raw.About: Dr. Sudhamani M J is a Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) at PES University, with over 22 years of academic and research experience. She holds a PhD in Computer Science and Engineering from VTU, with research focused on multimodal biometrics, machine learning, and image processing. Her work spans pattern recognition, healthcare AI, and intelligent systems, with over 17+ publications in reputed IEEE, Springer, and Scopus-indexed journals, including a Best Paper Award at ICDAM-2021. She has actively contributed to funded research projects, including proposals to national agencies such as ANRF, AICTE, and WELLCO ME. Dr. Sudhamani has played key leadership roles in curriculum design, accreditation (NBA & NAAC), and industry collaborations with organizations like Infosys, KPIT, and Samsung Innovation Campus. She is also the founder of student-driven initiatives such as BigO Coding Club and GDG club, fostering innovation and technical excellence among students. Her vision is to promote interdisciplinary, research-driven education by integrating AI-driven pedagogy, industry collaboration, and student-centered innovation. Actively mentoring students in AI, IoT, and interdisciplinary research projects. Passionate about applying AI for societal impact in healthcare and education.

raw.About: Dr. Veena R S, Professor, Department of Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML), PES University, a passionate teaching professional, who always believe in today’s students are tomorrow’s leaders. She has been associated with this field for 24 years. She holds a PDF in the field of Internet of Medical Things and PhD in the field of Computer Science and Engineering under the area of Expertise: Cloud Security. She is a firm believer of Knowledge is power and have the zeal to learn and explore new things. She has been recognized as a global mentor for UG/PG/PhD/PDF. She is a Recognized research supervisor of the VTU, Belagavi. With her credits there are 9 published Indian Patents and 2 granted Australian Patents, 2 books titled “Software Engineering approach towards Students Data Mining” published by Lulu publishers, United States ISBN: 9781387399901 and “Business Analytics and Data Science”, ISBN No: 978-93-5757-504-1, First Edition, Scientific International Publishing House (SIPH), August 2023., 1 book entitled “Business Analytics and Data Science” published by Scientific International Publishing House (SIPH) with ISBN: 978-93-5757-504-1 and 1 book chapter titled " A Cost-effective 2-tier Security Paradigm to Safeguard Cloud Data with Faster Authentication: A Recent Study" print ISBN: 978-93-5547-231-1, eBook ISBN: 978-93-5547-239-7 published by BP International in "Novel Perspectives of Engineering Research Vol. 9". Apart from this, she has several publications in peer-reviewed International Journals and Conferences Proceedings. Her technical area of expertise lies C, C++, Java, Python, Cloud Computing, Complier Design, Data Structures and Software Engineering. She believes in staying updated on the current fast paced world and have constantly attended multiple workshops (conducted by IITs) to keep herself upgraded. Dr. Veena R S is the life member of ISTE. She is a reviewer for various International Conferences on Computer Science and Emerging Technologies, IEEE and Editorial Board Member for American Jоսrnal of Information Science and Technology (http://www.ajist.org). She has completed several online courses hosted by NPTEL and Udemy. She is a peer reviewer for various IEEE conferences and journals. She has organized several FDPs, Workshops, Seminars, Technical Talks and Conferences. Also delivered technical talks and had been the chair for conferences. Currently guiding 2 PhD scholars and 1 PDF scholar

raw.About: My primary passion is grooming young minds and making them realize their own possibilities. I enjoy building competency (knowledge, process, mindset) and in University, I am redoing what I did in corporate world. I am now a learner, an educator and a researcher. I am one of the founding members of Dept of CSE (AI & ML) in PES University and is part of it's growth story. As a research guide, I participate actively instead of providing just executive guidance. I have worked for 26+ years first in government R&D and then in industry in various roles in all parts of the product life cycle i.e. consulting, professional services, and engineering both as individual contributor and as manager/director. I have worked both in system software and application software in diverse domains i.e. networking, finance and automobile. So, I am comfortable with changing the playground. My management experience has been mostly in product engineering and change management in engineering organizations. Curiosity, constant learning, and embracing changes are my key values. What I carry forward into the current academic setup are my management training, deep and broad exposure to industry (services and products), and ability to spot as well as mentor high-performers, and lead from the front. I usually lose interest in the obvious. Through my corporate years, I developed a keen interest in the macro patterns instead of the corporate ladder and my current passion in research is a continuation of that journey. My LinkedIn Profile : https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhaskarjyoti/?originalSubdomain=in

raw.About: Dr. Chetana Srinivas is an Associate professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML), PES University, RR Campus, Bengaluru. She has 17 years of teaching experience and 6 years of research experience. She received her bachelor's degree and Master's degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belagavi. She obtained her Doctoral Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University in Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences, Belagavi. Her current research interests include Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Image Processing and Big Data Analytics. She has published various patents. Published articles in reputed international journals and Conferences. She is a reviewer for various international conferences and journals. She is a life member of Indian Society for Technical Education and Institution of Engineers.

raw.About: Dr. Manjula Devananda is an interdisciplinary AI researcher and academician with expertise in health informatics, machine learning, and explainable AI. She holds a Ph.D. from the University of Otago, New Zealand, where her research focused on predictive workload modelling in primary healthcare. With a strong background in both academia and industry, she has served as Senior Manager – AI Research at Fusemachines (USA), Health Data Scientist in New Zealand, and Principal/Academic Director at KVM Institutions, India. Her teaching experience spans institutions in India, New Zealand, and Canada. Dr. Manjula has delivered numerous keynote talks, served on technical committees, and received several prestigious fellowships including the Otago Doctoral Scholarship and Callaghan Innovation Grant. Her research contributions are published in reputed international journals and conferences. She is passionate about AI education, research mentorship, and developing impactful, ethical AI systems across disciplines.

raw.name: Dr. Preethi S.J
raw.title: Associate Professor
raw.Additional Information: She has 11+ years of teaching experience and has served at leading institutions, including PES University in Bengaluru, Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering (PCCOE) in Pune, and Adichunchanagiri Institute of Technology (AIT) in Chikkamagaluru. Throughout her career, she has taught various courses in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML). She has supervised several undergraduate projects focused on image processing, machine learning, and deep learning. Furthermore, she has contributed to NAAC and NBA accreditation processes, as well as to academic coordination and departmental activities. Dr. Preethi S.J. is a member of professional bodies, including the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) and the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE). She has actively participated in numerous faculty development programs, published research in Scopus / WoS-indexed international journals, and presented papers at various national and international conferences. Her research contributions have resulted in 88+ citations, and her Google Scholar profile can be accessed at: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_gqTxvQAAAAJ&hl=en. She also serves as a reviewer for reputed journals, contributing to the academic research community. Her areas of specialization include Biometrics, Signal Processing, Image and Video Processing, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.

name: Dr. Ravi Gorripati
text: Name: Dr. Ravi Gorripati | Department: Computer Science (AIML) | Campus: RR | Research: centered on Machine Learning, GIS, and Sustainable Agriculture Systems | Bio: Dr. Ravi Gorripati has been engaged in teaching Computer Science & Engineering for over 10 years. A Ph.D. was earned from the Indian Institute of Information Technology Sri City, with research focusing on Participatory Modeling and AI for Water Resource Management. Research interests are centered on Machine Learning, GIS, and Sustainable Agriculture Systems. Several research papers have been published in high-impact journals, and presentations have been made at international conferences. Active participation has been shown in social service initiatives, including the organization of medical camps and environmental awareness programs. raw.About: Has over 10.8 years of academic experience in engineering institutions affiliated with VTU, Belagavi. Currently serving as Associate Professor, in Dept. of CSE-AIML, RR Campus. Has served as In-charge Head of the Department in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science and as an Associate Professor in the department of Information science & Engineering at East West Institute of Technology, Bangalore. Is an active academic contributor and has been involved in various institutional and university-level responsibilities, including Board of Examiners (BOE) in various VTU colleges, member and coordinator roles for NAAC, research projects, curriculum design, and departmental activities. Has played a key role in academic planning, syllabus structuring, and autonomous scheme coordination. Recognized research supervisor under VTU and is currently guiding two Ph.D. scholars and successfully mentored numerous undergraduate and postgraduate projects, contributing to student innovation and research development. Research interests include Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Medical Image Processing, and Internet of Things (IoT) and has a strong research track record with multiple publications in reputed international journals and IEEE conferences and also a reviewer for international conferences. Has actively participated in and completed several Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), workshops, and seminars in emerging technologies such as Generative AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, and Data Analytics.

raw.About: I am a dedicated professional with a strong background in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Computer Vision. I have a 13+ years of diverse experience in Teaching, Training, Research and Software Development with focus on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. With over four years of experience as a Software Engineer and Trainer at Capgemini, I have worked on impactful projects like Self-Driving Cars, ADAS Perception Models, Number Plate Detection, and other AI&ML based Projects while training 300+ engineers in advanced technologies such as AI, Machine Learning, Data Science, Data Structures, Linux Internals and Python. My academic journey includes roles as a Lecturer and Assistant Professor, teaching a diverse range of courses including Linux, Operating Systems, Data Structures, Database Management System, Data Science and Machine Learning. Passionate about Explainable AI and ethical practices, I aim to contribute meaningfully to advancing AI systems that are transparent, fair, and aligned with human values. My multifaceted experience blends technical expertise with a commitment to empowering the next generation of learners and innovators.

raw.About: Dr. Veena S is the Chairperson, Department of Computer Application at PES University, Bengaluru. She completed her MCA degree from Malnad College of Engineering, University of Mysore and M.Tech. degree from AAIDU, Allahabad. She holds a Ph.D in the area of Software Defined Networks from Visveswaraya Technological University. She has 26 years of teaching experience and 14 years of research experience. In her long teaching career, she has taught many different courses like Computer Networks, Advanced Computer Networks, Mobile Computing, Discrete Mathematical Structures, C, C++, Database Management Systems, Data Structures, Analysis and Design of Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence etc. at undergraduate, graduate, post graduate levels. She has 1ed seven research papers in National and International Conferences and Journals. She has also worked as Co-investigator in two funded research projects from Industry. She has been involved in training employees from IBM, Wipro and also invited as keynote speaker in several Hands-on workshops in Computer Networking. Dr. Veena has completed CCNA Exploration Certification course and involved in training students for CCNA certification. She has guided several student projects and research activities at undergraduate and post graduate levels. Her areas of interest includes Software Defined Networks, IPv6, Network Security, Sensor Networks and study of algorithms.

raw.About: Dr.S.Thenmozhi is a Professor in the Department of Computer Applications at PESU since 2014. She has been in teaching profession from the year 2000. She obtained her MCA degree in the year 2000 from Annamalai University, Chidambaram, M.Phil from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore in the year 2004 and PhD from Anna University, Chennai during 2014. She is qualified with SET. She has produced 6 MPhil graduates. She is recognized PhD supervisor at VTU and PESU. She is keen interested in incubating the research talent among students. Her area of interest is in Data Science and Machine Learning.

raw.About: Currently serving as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Applications, Niteesh K R is very passionate about passing on the torch of knowledge and motivating generations of students to come. He believes in treating his students as his co-learners and also has a commitment to scholarly research. He holds an MCA degree from B M S College of Engineering, Bangalore and his research interests include machine learning, deep learning, artificial intelligence, and data analytics. He's also very passionate about mathematics and data mining. He has successfully completed many MOOCs and is currently working on relevant research in the field of data science. Apart from teaching and research, he also is a part of the Rotaract Community and has been associated with various Rotaract clubs in the past as well.

raw.About: Based in Bangalore, India, I am an Assistant Professor of Communication Design, specializing in undergraduate courses such as Design Fundamentals, Fashion Communication, Interactive design, and visual identity systems. Professionally, I have collaborated with brands including Unilever brands, Tinder, Philips, Facebook Watch etc. My tenure as an Art Director at Target Corporation, India, honed my skills in art direction and brand strategy. Currently, I lead BottleCap, a multidisciplinary design studio delivering brand identity, website design, art direction, and packaging solutions. My research focuses on combining different fields to improve design education and exploring how communication design connects with the humanities in academic settings. I am particularly interested in understanding the cultural and historical backgrounds of artistic practices. By using various theories and critical methods, I aim to highlight how historical and cultural contexts influence creative work.

raw.About: Smrthi Harits is an educator, management consultant, and policy researcher with a deep commitment to public service, design education, and cultural heritage. She currently serves as the Program Manager at the Institute of Design, PES University, where she brings a multidisciplinary approach to design, management, and policy implementation. With an MBA in Marketing and extensive experience in service design for the public sector, her areas of interest include public policy marketing, last-mile delivery of government services, and leveraging India's soft power through artistic and cultural initiatives. She is particularly passionate about integrating design thinking and service innovation into policy frameworks to enhance citizen engagement and governance. With over a decade of experience in the non-profit sector, Smrthi has successfully led and managed NGOs, advocating for cultural preservation and social impact. She is the Founder of Kagakka Gubakka, a movement dedicated to reconnecting children with India's rich cultural heritage through storytelling and games. Additionally, she serves as a Director at Samhati Foundation, an organization focused on strengthening and advocating for the Indian family system. Her work spans education, policy, and cultural entrepreneurship, making her a key contributor to both academic and social discourse in India.

Member of the DAC | Bio: Sangeeta Modi received B.E degree in electrical engineering from NIT, Kurukshetra in 1999. She received M.Tech degree in Power system and Drives from YMCA University of Science and Technology, Faridabad. She is pursuing Ph.D in power system area. She was a recipient of HSIDC scholarship at NIT Kurukshetra. She has an experience of 16 years in teaching B.Tech and M.Tech students. Her research interests include power system analysis, control of microgrids & smart microgrids and power electronics. She has presented many papers in national and international conferences. name: Dr. Vaishnavi Sankar
text: Name: Dr. Vaishnavi Sankar | Department: Electrical & Electronics | Campus: RR | Research: Hardware Security, and Graph learning | Responsibilities: Research Coordinator (Assist) Publicity Coordinator | Bio: Vaishnavi Sankar received her B. raw.About: Dr. Shikha Tripathi holds a PhD from BITS, Pilani, India and a Masters degree from BIT, Mesra, Ranchi, India. Her research interests include Speech/Image Processing, Architectures for transforms used in signal processing applications, Music signal processing and Control algorithms for robotic applications. Dr. Tripathi joined PES University, Bangalore in July 2017. Currently she is serving as Professor in Dept. of Electronics & Communication Engineering and research head of the Electronic City campus. Prior to this she was serving as Professor & Chairperson, Dept. of Electronics & Communication Engineering, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, School of Engineering, Bangalore campus, since July 2009. She has worked at BITS Pilani, Pilani campus in various capacities before joining Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham during 1998 to 2009.

raw.About: Raghavendra G. Kulkarni received BE in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Karnatak University in 1979, MTech in Electrical Engineering from IIT Madras in 1982, and PhD from IIT Kharagpur in 1998. He joined Hybrid Microcircuits (HMC) division of Bharat Electronics Ltd., (BEL) Bengaluru in 1982, and developed several Surface Acoustic Wave (SAW) devices for commercial and defence applications. From 1998 to 2014, Dr. Kulkarni successfully led a team of R & D engineers for development of SAW devices, thick-film & thin-film HMCs, and MEMS pressure transducers for strategic applications. Dr. Kulkarni won two BEL R & D Excellence Awards; first one for development of SAW filters used in TV receivers (1989), and the second one for development of HMCs used in missile telemetry (2011). In November 2013, he received Raksha-Mantri Award for development of electronic modules for missiles. Dr. Kulkarni has obtained two patents on SAW devices and has authored more than eighty-five papers in the field of SAW devices, signal processing, and mathematics. He is the inventor of several window functions like polynomial windows, hyperbolic cosine windows, and sine windows, for signal processing applications. In September 2014, Dr. Kulkarni joined PES University, Bengaluru, as Distinguished Professor in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering. He is a senior member of IEEE, life member of Ramanujan Mathematical Society, Indian Mathematical Society, and IMAPS-India. He has given invited talks at TIFR Mumbai, IIT Delhi, SSPL Delhi, IGCAR Kalpakkam, LRDE Bangalore, IISc Bengaluru, Defence Lab Jodhpur, etc., and conducted workshops on design of SAW filters at ISRO and BEL, Bengaluru. Dr Kulkarni received outstanding educator award for the year 2023 from IEEE AP/MTT Society Bangalore chapter for his outstanding contribution to the antenna/microwave education. He also received Protsahan award for the journal paper publications in the field of communication engineering from IEEE COmSoc Bangalore chapter.

raw.About: Dr. Anuradha M holds both Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Engineering from Bangalore University. During her academic tenure, she excelled in the subject of Advanced Control Systems and secured the second rank at the university level in her Master’s program. She was subsequently awarded a Doctoral degree from the prestigious Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh. She began her professional journey with the Karnataka Electricity Board in Bangalore as a trainee. In 1992, she joined P.E.S. Institute of Technology (PESIT), where she served in various academic roles—starting as a Lecturer, then as Assistant Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) until 2001. She later served as Professor and Head of the Telecommunication Engineering Department until May 2018. From June 2017 to July 2023, she held the position of Chairperson of the ECE Department at PES University (PESU). She is currently serving as a Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PESU. Her research interests span Distributed Generation, Microgrids, Reliability, Antennas, and Electromagnetics, V2X. She successfully completed an in-house project funded by PES and has published several research papers in reputed journals. Notably, she received commendation and a monetary incentive from the Central Power Research Institute (CPRI) for her publication in the Journal of CPRI. She is currently working on a funded project related to V2G. She has actively organized and contributed to numerous technical workshops and seminars in areas such as Control Systems, Reliability Engineering, Electromagnetics, Antennas, Mobile Communication, and Renewable Energy. Additionally, she has conducted workshops on holistic topics like Spirituality, Yoga, and Personality Development. To bridge the gap between theoretical concepts and real-world applications, she has initiated and led several industrial visits for students to organizations such as BSNL, AIR, SPT, ISRO, BEL, BHEL, Micropack, and P&T. She is also passionate about community service, having organized multiple outreach programs for government school children and visually challenged students. Under her leadership, the department has received the Best Department Stall award multiple times at PRAKALPA, a prominent student project exhibition hosted by the institute.

raw.About: He is currently heading CORI (Crucible of Research and Innovation), a center for interdisciplinary exploration and CRSST (Center for Research in Space, Science and Technology) and is also a Professor with the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), at PES University. He gained rich exposure to design related to avionics and spacecraft systems during his stints as Project Trainee at Indian Space Research Organization and as a scientist at Aeronautical Development Agency (ADA), DRDO Lab. He received Best M.Tech Supervisor Award (Second Prize) from the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) for the year 2021, IETE Biman Behari Sen Memorial Award in 2015, BITES Best Ph.D. Thesis Award from the Board for IT Education Standards in 2015, Young Engineer Award in the year 2013 from the Institution of Engineers (India). He has six patent grants and five patents are under examination. He has published 125+ papers in International Journals/Conferences and has received nearly 1000 citations with h-index 17 and i10-index 28 for his research papers and has received a couple of best paper awards too. Three of his research papers published in reputed International Journals were listed in the Top 25 hottest articles ranking 3rd(IET Signal Processing), 8th (Elsevier Microprocessor and Microsystems), and 22nd(Elsevier Neurocomputing).

Niranjana Krupa is a Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. She has received her Bachelor of Engineering Degree in Electronics and Communication and Master Degree in Computer Engineering from University of Mysore. She has also been awarded with a doctoral degree in Electrical Electronics and Systems Engineering from the prestigious National University of Malaysia, where she also served as a Post-doctoral Fellow. She has a rich and a varied experience in both industry and academics. Her research interests involve biomedical signal processing, instrumentation and development of intelligent systems. raw.About: Dr B. Niranjana Krupa is a Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. She has received her Bachelor of Engineering Degree in Electronics and Communication and Master Degree in Computer Engineering from University of Mysore. She has also been awarded with a doctoral degree in Electrical Electronics and Systems Engineering from the prestigious National University of Malaysia, where she also served as a Post-doctoral Fellow. She has a rich and a varied experience in both industry and academics. Her research interests involve biomedical signal processing, instrumentation and development of intelligent systems. Two projects that were completed under her guidance and supervision have won first place in competitions held at national level. She has also been presented with 'Sir.M.Visvesvaraya Award for Best Social Impact', for a project on cardiac disorders in Prakalp - 2011, at PESIT. She has number of publications in the field of Biomedical Signal Processing, of which one of her research papers was awarded as the best paper in an International conference, IEEE INDICON 2015.

raw.About: Dr. Sanjeev G. received his B. E. degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, Bangalore and the M. Tech. degree in Digital Electronics and Communication Engineering from M. S. Ramaiah Institute of Technology, Bangalore, both from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum. He obtained his Ph.D. degree in signal processing for communications from the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. He is currently a professor in the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. He has earlier worked with PES Institute of Technology and CMR Institute of Technology in Bangalore. His research interests are in the areas of detection and estimation theory, information theory and statistics, cross-layer optimization and machine learning techniques for communication systems. He is a co-recipient of the best paper awards at IEEE INDICON 2016, IEEE ICEECCOT 2019 and IEEE CONECCT 2020.

name: Dr. Sunita M S

raw.About: Obtained her B.Sc degree from Bangalore University and Secured University 8th Rank. Obtained her M.Sc (Physics) degree from Bangalore University and Secured University 2nd Rank. Obtained her M.S (By Research) degree from VIT University, Chennai Campus. She was the first research student in the school of Electronics Engineering, SENSE, to obtain a research degree from this campus. The area of research being Memory Design and Testing. She obtained her Ph.D degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from PES University, Bengaluru. Her research work was based on Buck and Boost Converters for low voltage applications. She has also completed a Proficience course on Embedded System Design from IISc, Bangalore. She has a total teaching experience of 35 years with 32 years at PESIT/PES University. She has taught a variety of subjects at both UG and PG level. She has authored more than 25 papers in International Journals and Conferences. Her current interest is in Analog circuits, Power Management Integrated circuits and Memory Design and Testing.

raw.About: Dr. Vamsi received his Ph.D. degree from the School of Computer Engineering, Nanyang Technological University (NTU), Singapore in 2011. He worked as a research associate in NTU (Feb-Oct 2011) and Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Nov 2011-Feb 2014). He is presently a Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communications Engineering, PES University. He is also the Head of Wireless Communications Networking (WiNC) domain. His research interests include system design and automation, optimization, deep reinforcement learning and scheduling algorithms in general. More specifically, he likes to design large scale distributed services and applications over wireless networks. Dr. Vamsi has published papers in reputed IEEE journals and international conferences. He regularly reviews papers for IEEE Trans. on Smart Grid, IEEE Trans. on Industrial Informatics, IEEE Trans. on Power Systems, International Journal on Electric Power and Energy Systems and Applied Energy. He has also reviewed many papers for other IEEE journals and conferences. Dr. Vamsi has held several administrative responsibilities such as being Dept. coordinator for ABET and IET accreditation for PES University (2015-16), Dept. coordinator for faculty recruitment (2015), Dept. Coordinator for ECE curriculum and syllabus (2015-Present) and Head of the Wireless Communication and Networking Domain (2021-Present).

"Numerically Controlled Oscillator (NCO) Based Frequency Converter" in IJCA - 2014 "High Performance Reconfigurable Routers for Power Optimization " at WiSE-2013, National Conference on Wireless Communication, Signal Processing, Embedded Systems "FPGA Implementation of Iterative Log Multiplier Using Operand Decomposition For Image Processing Application" in IJRASET - 2014. raw.About: Annapurna K Y obtained her B.E. in ECE from Bangalore University, M.Tech. in Electronics from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum and Ph.D in the area of Hardware Security from VTU, Belgaum. She has teaching experience of 14 years and Industry experience of 5 years. She is a member of IEEE . Her areas of interest are Analog and Digital VLSI.

name: Dr. Ashwini
text: Name: Dr. Ashwini | Department: Electronics & Communications | Campus: RR | Research: As an Electonics Engineer as well as musician her interest is mainly music signal processing. Currently she is working in the area of Audio signal processing. | Expertise/Teaching: UG subjects:- Basic Electrical Engg., Field theory, LIC, Basic Electronics Engg.,DSP,Signals and systems,Audio technology, etc PG subjects:- CMOS VLSI, Modern Power Electronics, etc | Responsibilities: She has handled various responsibilities of the department like Incharge for Process, Web upload, News letter, Faculty advisor, Class teacher, NBA team, IQAC. | Bio: Ashwini holds a bachelor degree in Electrical and electronics engineering from Manipal Institute of Technology, Manipal. She has done M.Tech in Digital Electronics and Communication, Ph. D. in the area of Music signal processing. She has been serving the Electronics and Communication dept. since 2007. She was working at Southwest Tennessee College, Tennessee, USA. during 2003-2005. She has worked in NITK, Surathkal during the period 2000-2002. She has carried out several projects in the field of Audio signal signal processing as well as in multimedia communications, VLSI, fault analysis. She has guided various projects mainly in the area of music signal processing. | Success: https://www.youtube.com/c/VishwiniBhat www.vishwini.com Dr.Ashwini has won the Karnataka Women Excellence Award 2023 on Sunday 28.05.2023 in a ceremony held at Bapuji Auditorium in Davangere. | Recent Pubs: Ashwini, Vijaya Krishna A and Sathwik Acharya, "Analytical Comparison of Classification Models for Raga Identification in Carnatic Classical Instrumental Polyphonic Audio," Computational Statistics, SN Computer Science, Oct 2020. raw.name: Dr. Ashwini
raw.title: Associate Professor
raw.Education: B.E M.Tech. Ph. D.
raw.Additional Information: Apart from the regular academics she is also a Veena player, recording artist and vocalist by passion winning several accolades for her pure rendition of classical and fusion music. During her long stint in the US, she has worked along with her musician husband, towards setting up their own music studio bringing out several CD's. She has also served as Cultural Secretary of the "Taranga Kannada Sangha of Memphis". She is the recipient of several prestigious awards in the field of music. She has also received "Karnataka Women Excellence Award-2023'.She is one of the leading Veena players of the Indian classical fusion band, "Svaramrita". www.vishwini.com, www.svaramrita.com https://www.youtube.com/c/VishwiniBhat www.vishwini.com

name: Dr. Aswini N
text: Name: Dr. Aswini N | Department: Electronics & Communications | Campus: RR | Research: Autonomous Vehicles - UAV Image/Data Processing, Computer Vision techniques | Expertise/Teaching: Digital Image Processing Analog Circuit Deisgn Analog Electronics Power Electronics Basic Electronics Digital VLSI Design Analog Circuit Design Control Systems | Responsibilities: IQAC Coordinator, ECE Department, PES University | Bio: Dr. Aswini N is working in the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, PES University Ring Road campus. She has completed her PhD from Visveswaraya Technological University (VTU), Belagavi and Masters in VLSI Design and Embedded Systems from RNS Institute of Technology, Bengaluru. Dr. Aswini is a passionate teacher and researcher in multidisciplinary areas such as Unmanned Aerial Vehicles, VLSI Technology and Computer Vision. Currently she is guiding one PhD Scholar and has multiple Scopus indexed publications to credit. | Career History: Guest Lecturer, College of Engineering, Trivandrum, 2002 - 2003 Lecturer, Marian Engineering College, Trivandrum, 2003 - 2004 Lecturer, BNMIT, Bengaluru, 2004 - 2004 Lecturer, HEA Polytechnic, Bengaluru, 2008 - 2009 Assistant Professor, MV College of Engineering, Bengaluru, 2011 - 2018 Assistant Professor, CMR Institute of Technology, Bengaluru, 2019 - 2023 Associate Professor, PES University, 202... | Success: Highly Recommended Award for the Paper “UAV and Obstacle Sensing Techniques – a perspective”, published in International Journal of Intelligent Unmanned systems, (2018) Emerald Publishers, UK. Completed various NPTEL Swayam MOOC Courses Drone training completed under Dr. S N Omkar, Chief Research Scientist, Aerospace Department, IISC Bengaluru. Knowledge of building and calibrating a Quad copter using Mission planner software Filed and published 2 patents, 1 waiting for examination | Recent Pubs: N Aswini, E Krishna Kumar, S V Uma, “UAV and Obstacle Sensing Techniques- A perspective (2018)”, International Journal of Intelligent Unmanned Systems (IJIUS), UK, Vol. 6 No. 1, pp. 32-46. https://doi.org/10.1108/IJIUS-11-2017-0013 Aswini N, Uma S V, “Obstacle avoidance and distance measurement for Unmanned Aerial vehicles using monocular vision”, International Journal of Electrical and Computer Engineering (IJECE) Vol.9, No.5, October2019, pp. 3504~3511ISSN: 2088-8708, doi: 10.11591/ijece. v9i5.pp3504-351 Aswini N, Uma SV, “Onboard Obstacle Sensing Mechanism for Drones Using Monocular Camera”, ARPN Journal of Engineering and Applied Sciences (ISSN 1819-6608), 2020, 15 (7), 949-953. raw.Additional Information: I am an active researcher in the domain of Photonics and Optical materials and device design. He has worked with premier names in the field in UK, Germany and IISc India. I have been in the teaching profession since 2013, from National institute of Technology Sikkim to Amrita Vishwavidyapeetham, deemed university. I have established and run Photonics Research Laboratory at Amrita School of engineering, Bengaluru. My students have been accepted with scholarships at Universities with high ranks e.g. KTH Sweden abroad, and in IISc (India), etc. Some students have been absorbed in industry e.g., Bosch etc. My project student from 2018 batch (Amrita University) has secured all India rank 4 in National Talent Hunt contest. My students (UG and PG) have published regularly with me and I expect serious students from PES University to get involved in my research domain of Photonics and Quantum systems. raw.About: Dr. Kaustav Bhowmick specializes in the field of Photonic devices, Photonic materials and optical technology. Post-PhD (University of Nottingham, UK, 2013), he has worked as Assistant Professor, in National Institute of Technology, Sikkim (2013-2015) and Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwavidyapeetham Deemed University, Bengaluru (2016-2019). During the said period, Dr. Bhowmick has been instrumental in setting up Photonics research laboratory, MoUs with national and international universities, supervising UG, PG and PhD students, and 1ing research in national and international journals and conferences. His project students have been recruited in well-known international and national universities and in companies like Bosch. Dr. Bhowmick has done research with some well-known names in Photonics, both in India and abroad. Currently, in PES University, his target is to drive research in Photonic and related quantum technologies, preferably in a interdisciplinary manner. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/drbhowmickphotonics
