raw.About: Prof. Rajasekar Mohan is an Associate Professor at PES University Bangalore. His research interests include wireless communications, healthcare systems and embedded systems. He manages the Microsoft Innovation Lab at the PES University. It is a research lab for the students of PES University where students develop innovative projects during Summer Internships. He handholds student projects in several domains viz. Robotics, IoT, Machine Learning, Sensor Networks and Virtual Reality. Prof. Rajasekar is also the Nokia Faculty Champion for PES University. He collaborates with Nokia for various technology projects for students in Communication and activities of interest to both academia and the industry. He is the coordinator for e-Yantra competitions conducted by Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay for PESU. He is also the coordinator for various University Collaboration activities organized by ITU at PESU. As a part of the Microsoft Innovation Lab and Dept of ECE, several 24-hr hackathons are regularly conducted successfully in the campus.

raw.About: Dr. Shruthi M.L.J. is an esteemed Associate Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. With a profound dedication to advancing the field of Electronics and Communication, Dr. Shruthi has made significant contributions, particularly in the realm of Image and Video Processing. Her academic journey is marked by a Doctoral Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University, where she specialized in Image and Video Processing, and a Master's degree from Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, focusing on VLSI & Embedded systems Design. Dr. Shruthi's scholarly work is well-recognized in the academic community, underscored by her numerous Scopus Indexed papers and patents. One of her notable achievements include receiving the Best Paper Award for her paper titled "Non-Parametric histogram based skin modeling," at the IEEE ICCIC 2013. Her current research endeavors are in the cutting-edge areas of video processing and AI-VLSI, showcasing her commitment to integrating artificial intelligence with VLSI design. Her leadership and expertise have also been recognized on international platforms, having chaired a session in International Conference RAAI-2023, Singapore.

raw.About: Sudeendra kumar K received B.E. from VTU and holds Masters and Doctoral Degrees from NIT Rourkela. He started his career with Wipro Biomed, Bangalore worked with Beckman Limited Equipment. His professional career includes a stint as Application Engineer for Freescale Semiconductors and Product Test Engineer for Qualcomm. He has got significant experience in Special Manpower Development Project -II (SMDP-II) and C2SD (SMDP-Chip to Systems Development) project under the aegis of Ministry of Communication and Information Technology, Govt. of India. He was responsible establishing VLSI labs, Training on EDA tools, chip design and tape out. He has got more than 30 publications in reputed journals and Conferences and also a reviewer for the Elsevier VLSI Integration Journal, IEEE Consumer Electronics Magazine and IEEE Transactions of Emerging Computing Systems. Currently, He is Joint Domain Head of VLSI and Embedded Systems in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, PES University.

name: Dr. Amina Khan
text: Name: Dr. Amina Khan | Department: Electronics & Communications | Campus: RR | Research: My research focus on establishing strategy for allocating resources and optimal placement of a group of UAVs to offer wider wireless coverage area for Disaster Management System. It also focus on developing a collaborative approach between multi-UAVs and SAR Team to boost connectivity between them and to efficiently govern the disaster area. | Expertise/Teaching: For B. Tech: Digital Communication For B. Tech: Computer Communication Networks | Bio: Amina Khan received her B. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Islamic University of Science and Technology, Jammu & Kashmir, India in 2015 and M. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, Jammu & Kashmir, India in 2017. She received her Ph.D. in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, katra, India on research topic "Unified self-configurable network architecture optimized for disaster detection and recovery", in 2023. Her area of interest is Wireless Sensor Network, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks and UAV Networks. She has published many articles in the reputed International journals and prestigious conference proceedings, and an author of many book chapters as... | Recent Pubs: 1. Amina, Khan, Sumeet Gupta, and Sachin Kumar Gupta. "Multi-hazard disaster studies: Monitoring, detection, recovery, and management, based on emerging technologies and optimal techniques", International journal of disaster risk reduction 47 (2020): 101642. 2. raw.About: Amina Khan received her B. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Islamic University of Science and Technology, Jammu & Kashmir, India in 2015 and M. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, Jammu & Kashmir, India in 2017. She received her Ph.D. in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, katra, India on research topic "Unified self-configurable network architecture optimized for disaster detection and recovery", in 2023. Her area of interest is Wireless Sensor Network, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks and UAV Networks. She has published many articles in the reputed International journals and prestigious conference proceedings, and an author of many book chapters as well. She has been serving as a reviewer for several leading journals under Wiley and Elsevier.

raw.About: Dr. Anagha K. Kowshik obtained her Ph.D. degree from PES University in Dec. 2024 in the domain of Signal processing for wireless communications. She received her B. E. degree in Telecommunication Engineering from PES Institute of Technology, Bengaluru under Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum, and the M. Tech. degree in Signal Processing (ECE) from PES University, Bengaluru. She is currently an Assistant professor in the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. She has close to 4 years of industry experience and 5 years of research experience. Her research interests include signal processing for wireless communications, MIMO systems, advanced multiple access techniques such as NOMA and RSMA, machine learning for communication systems, radar communications, Kalman filtering, and integrated sensing and communications. She has published several papers in reputed journals and conferences. She is the recipient of the Protsahan Award 2024 from IEEE ComSoc Bangalore Chapter.

E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from RNS Institute of Technology, Bengaluru under Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum, and the M. Tech. degree in Signal Processing (ECE) from PES University, Bengaluru. She is currently an Assistant professor in the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. Her research interests are in the areas of signal processing for wireless communications, MIMO, spatial modulation techniques, intelligent reflecting surfaces and machine learning techniques for communication systems. She has published papers in reputed journals and conferences. She is the recipient of the Protsahan Award 2024 from IEEE ComSoc Bangalore Chapter, and the co-recipient of Prof. T. K. Sarkar memorial best paper award in antennas and RF technologies for next-gen communications track in INDICON 2022.

name: Rashmi N Ugarakhod
text: Name: Rashmi N Ugarakhod | Department: Electronics & Communications | Campus: RR | Research: Image Processing, Computer vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, System Identification, Control algorithms for robotics and many other applications | Bio: Dr. Rashmi N U received B.E. degree in electronics and communication from Visvesvaraya Technological University, India, M. Tech. degree in Intelligent Systems from PESIT, Bangalore and the Ph. D. degree in engineering from the PES University, Bangalore, India. She is currently an Assistant Professor of Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. Her research interests include Image Processing, Computer vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, System Identification, Control algorithms for robotics and many other applications.

(Co-Coordinator) Organized industrial visit to EMI/EMC lab, PCB lab, and 4G lab at ITI Ltd., Bengaluru. (21/03/2025) | Bio: Dr. Sayyed Arif Ali earned his PhD in electronics engineering from Aligarh Muslim University (AMU), Aligarh, UP. His PhD research title was “Low-Cost SIW Antennas.” Dr. Arif has a vast teaching experience of 16 years. Before PES University, he worked as an assistant professor in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering at Mewar University, Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. Prior to that, he was a lecturer at Jaipur Engineering College, Jaipur. Dr. Arif has published several research papers on microstrip and SIW antennas for modern wireless applications. He is also a Senior Member of IEEE, USA, and serves as a reviewer in various journals (IEEE Access/Springer/Wiley, etc.). He is a Faculty advisor to IEEE APS SBC, PES University. | Career History: Lecturer, Jaipur Engineering College, Jaipur, Rajasthan, 2009 - 2013 Associate Lecturer, Mewar University, Gangrar, Chittorgarh, Rajasthan, 2013 - 2016 Assistant Professor, Mewar University, Gangrar, Chittorgarh, Rajasthan, 2016 - 2019 Teaching Assistant (JRF), Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh, UP, 2019 - 2021 Teaching Assistant (SRF), Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh, UP, 2021 - 2024 Assistan... | Success: 8th Merit in RRMI GK All India Competition (1995) First Prize- Science Exhibition (Still Model) – St Anselm School (1997) Math Award in Secondary School Exam by CBSE (1997) Many Prizes in Table Tennis at school and college level Third prize- Inter College Debate Competition at ACEIT, Jaipur (2001) Gold medal- Intra College C/C++ programming contest at ACEIT, Jaipur (2003) Allrounder of the Year Prize- ACEIT, Jaipur (2003) Best Conference Paper Award - ICIET Conference, ACEIT, Kukas, Jaipur, India (2014) Best Conference Paper Award - RITET Conference, Sangam University, Bhilwara, India (2018) Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF) Award for pursuing a PhD (2019) Best Conference Paper Award - 5th International IEEE Conference IMPACT, Aligarh, India (2022) | Recent Pubs: Sayyed Arif Ali, Mohd Wajid, Muhammad Shah Alam, M. raw.About: Dr. Sayyed Arif Ali earned his PhD in electronics engineering from Aligarh Muslim University (AMU), Aligarh, UP. His PhD research title was “Low-Cost SIW Antennas.” Dr. Arif has a vast teaching experience of 16 years. Before PES University, he worked as an assistant professor in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering at Mewar University, Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. Prior to that, he was a lecturer at Jaipur Engineering College, Jaipur. Dr. Arif has published several research papers on microstrip and SIW antennas for modern wireless applications. He is also a Senior Member of IEEE, USA, and serves as a reviewer in various journals (IEEE Access/Springer/Wiley, etc.). He is a Faculty advisor to IEEE APS SBC, PES University.

name: Dr. Shagun Gupta
text: Name: Dr. Shagun Gupta | Department: Electronics & Communications | Campus: RR | Research: Biosensors/Wireless sensor networks for healthcare applications Bio-Electronics / Biomedical Implants/ Point-of-Care Devices Signal Processing/ Image Processing IoT, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning VLSI Design, Lab-on-Chip technology, Organ-on-Chip Nanoelectronics and devices, Nanomaterials and Nanoparticle Synthesis Microbiome Study and Diagnostics | Expertise/Teaching: For B.Tech: Principles of Digital Signal Processing For M.Tech: Modern Digital Signal Processing | Bio: Dr. Shagun Gupta holds a PhD and a Master’s Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University (SMVDU). She has received her Bachelor of Engineering Degree in Electronics and Communication from the University of Jammu. raw.About: Dr. Shagun Gupta holds a PhD and a Master’s Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University (SMVDU). She has received her Bachelor of Engineering Degree in Electronics and Communication from the University of Jammu. She has distinguished herself by qualifying the GATE (EC) exam in 2014, the CBSE-UGC-NET exam in Electronic Science in 2016, and achieving the prestigious CBSE-UGC-NET-JRF in 2017.

raw.About: Shahid Aziz received B.E. in Electronics Engineering from University of Pune in 2009, M.Tech. in Communication Engineering from West Bengal University of Technology in 2014 and earned his Ph.D. from NIT Patna in August 2025. He served as an Assistant Professor at Maulana Azad College of Engineering and Technology, Patna for nearly a decade in various capacities until September 2023. In October 2023, Shahid Aziz joined PES University, Bengaluru, as Assistant Professor in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering. His research interests are primarily focused on speech and audio processing, with a specific emphasis on Speaker Verification Systems for children. Currently, his research revolves around developing a robust short-utterance based children’s speaker verification system. Mr. Aziz is an active member of professional organizations such as the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE), IEEE, IEEE Signal Processing Society, International Speech Communication Association (ISCA).Outside of academia, he has been appointed to the role of an NTA Observer for the National Testing Agency, Ministry of Education, Government of India. In this capacity, since 2019, he has monitored the conduct of prestigious national-level high-stakes entrance examinations for admission/fellowship in higher educational institutions in India and abroad.

Her commitment and passion towards teaching and also institution building and networking, makes her stand out from the crowd. She has more than 4 papers and book chapters to her credit. She believes in inter-disciplinary research and collaboration. Her other interests include singing and anchoring which she has been following for more than a decade.

raw.About: Dr.Madhukumar. K is a passionate college educator, who has taught a broad range of management and marketing courses at the graduate and post-graduate levels in the classroom and online learning environments. He has 17 years of Industry & teaching experience, worked in various reputed organizations like CITIBANK and CAPITAL DEALS & SOFTS PVT Ltd Bangalore. He was awarded Ph.D. in the marketing domain from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum. Research interests include consumer behavior, digital marketing, and integrated marketing communication. He has presented papers in several national and international conferences and 1ed research papers in Scopus & peer-reviewed journals. He has successfully organized and conducted National conferences.

raw.About: Dr. Shobha Rani. M, is an aspiring professional academician with a steadfast commitment and profound passion for teaching law. Her journey in academia is characterized by a dedication to enriching legal education through rigorous scholarship and transformative pedagogical approaches. She has pursued her Ph.D. in Law in 2021 from University Law College & Dept. of Studies in Law, Bangalore University on the Topic – “A Critical Study on the Constitutional Principle of Secularism in India with Special reference to Endowments”. She pursued her post-graduation in Law. Her specialization is Constitutional Law and Legal Order. She teaches papers like Constitutional Law, Personal Laws, Administrative Law, Jurisprudence, Interpretation of Statutes. She had an overall experience of 10 years of teaching in law. Currently she is working as an Assistant Professor in Faculty of Law, PES University, RR Campus, Bengaluru. She has published Articles in National and International, Peer-reviewed Journals and also participated and presented research papers in various State, National and International level Seminars, Workshops and Conferences. She is interested in multi-disciplinary legal research especially women related issues.

name: Sonika Nair S
text: Name: Sonika Nair S | Department: Law | Campus: RR | Bio: S Sonika Nair is an Assistant Professor of Law with over seven years of academic and industry experience in the field of Intellectual Property Rights (IPR). She is currently pursuing her PhD at Christ University, Bengaluru, with a research focus on the protection of foodstuffs under Geographical Indications law. Prior to her academic career, she practiced as a legal associate with a leading IP firm, gaining hands-on experience in trademark litigation, filings, and advisory. Sonika has presented papers at national and international forums and has published in areas intersecting IP, traditional knowledge, and sustainability. She is passionate about legal research, innovation policy, and mentoring the next generation of IP professionals. | Career History: Assistant Professor, Kerala Law Academy Law College, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, 2016 - 2017 Trademark Attorney, Puthran And Associates IP Attorneys, 2017 - 2020 Assistant Professor, School of Law, Saveetha University, Chennai, 2020 - 2020 Assistant Professor, School of Legal Studies, CMR University, 2021 - 2023 Assistant Professor, School of Law, Presidency University, 2023 - 2024

Professor and Chairperson, Department of Mechanical Engineering Professor and Chairperson, Department of Mechanical Engineering - Post Graduate Studies | Bio: Dr. V. Krishna is a Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering and Dean, Student Affairs. He has received his Ph.D. from Visveswaraya Technological University, Belgaum, India for his thesis on 'Investigations on Cryogenic Heat Exchangers'. He started his academic career in March 1993 and has over 28 years of experience in teaching, research, consultancy and administration. He is Reviewer for - Heat Transfer Engineering 1ed by Taylor and Francis, International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer 1ed by Elsevier etc. Dr. V. Krishna specializes in the Thermal Engineering Domain and is the Head of the Process Modelling Research Laboratory (PMR Lab) which focusses on cutting edge research in the field of process modelling and its allied areas. He has over 24 publications in peer review... | Career History: Dean, Student Affairs, Professor, PES University, 2019 - Till date Chairperson PG studies, P E S University, Bangalore, 2017 - 2019 Chairperson & Professor, P E S University, Bangalore, 2014 - 2017 Associate Professor, PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore, 2008 - 2014 Assistant Professor, PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore, 2002 - 2008 Lecture, PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore, 1997 - ... | Success: Patent - Provisional: [1] Krishna V, Babu Rao Ponangi, T R Seetharam, K N Seetharamu, Bharath R. Bharadwaj, Manjunath D M, Sanketh Mogeraya K, "Advanced coolants with nanoparticles", Provisional Indian Patent number 201741044247 filed on 08.12.2017. Visiting Professor Visiting Professor Dr. V. Krishna was invited as Visiting Professor at Technologico de Monterrey, Mexico from 25th to 31st August 2018. He visited two of its campuses at Toluca and Puebla. During this period he took a course on 'Automobile Radiators-an Inside Story' and also gave seminar on 'Drivers for Sustainable Energy in the Automobile Industry' and 'Introduction to Internal Combustion Engine', | Recent Pubs: V. raw.About: Dr. V. Krishna is a Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering and Dean, Student Affairs. He has received his Ph.D. from Visveswaraya Technological University, Belgaum, India for his thesis on 'Investigations on Cryogenic Heat Exchangers'. He started his academic career in March 1993 and has over 28 years of experience in teaching, research, consultancy and administration. He is Reviewer for - Heat Transfer Engineering 1ed by Taylor and Francis, International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer 1ed by Elsevier etc. Dr. V. Krishna specializes in the Thermal Engineering Domain and is the Head of the Process Modelling Research Laboratory (PMR Lab) which focusses on cutting edge research in the field of process modelling and its allied areas. He has over 24 publications in peer reviewed international journals (10) and conferences (14). He has been an invited speaker and chair at numerous national and international conferences. Dr. V. Krishna was invited as Visiting Professor at Technologico de Monterrey, Mexico from 25th to 31st August 2018. He visited two of its campuses at Toluca and Puebla. During this period he took a course on 'Automobile Radiators-an Inside Story' and also presented seminars on 'Drivers for Sustainable Energy in the Automobile Industry' and 'Introduction to Internal Combustion Engine'. He has also visited a number of universities in UK in 2013, as part of a tour to look at the best practices and possible collaborations. Dr. V. Krishna is also an accomplished mridangam artiste and has accompanied most of the top musicians across the country in carnatic music concerts.

Noida Steering committee member for NAAC visit to NIET during May 2017 | Bio: Bachelor of Mechanical Engineering from PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore University and Masters Degree from BMS College of Engineering, Bangalore, Visveswaraya Technological University. He received his Ph.D. degree from National Institute of Technology (NIT), Tiruchirappalli during 2011 in the area of impact characteristics of composite laminates. He started his career as Graduate Engineer Trainee at Bharat Earth Movers Limited (BEML). He joined PESIT as lecturer during 2000 and presently holding a position as Professor and Chairperson in the Department of Mechanical Engineering, PES University. He is the Domain Head of Advanced Composite Research Centre (ACRC) at PES University. raw.About: Bachelor of Mechanical Engineering from PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore University and Masters Degree from BMS College of Engineering, Bangalore, Visveswaraya Technological University. He received his Ph.D. degree from National Institute of Technology (NIT), Tiruchirappalli during 2011 in the area of impact characteristics of composite laminates. He started his career as Graduate Engineer Trainee at Bharat Earth Movers Limited (BEML). He joined PESIT as lecturer during 2000 and presently holding a position as Professor and Chairperson in the Department of Mechanical Engineering, PES University. He is the Domain Head of Advanced Composite Research Centre (ACRC) at PES University. He also had held the position of Dean Academics for a period of one year at Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology, Greater Noida, UP. He is the faculty advisor of Team HAYA, the racing car team of PES and he is also the faculty integrator of PACE activities. He has led the PACE team to University of Sao Paulo, Brazil and University of Cincinnati, US.

raw.About: Mr. Mantesh Basappa Khot currently working as a assistant professor in design domain, Mechanical Engineering department. I completed BE in Mechanical Engineering from University BDT College of Engineering, Davangere. I have done M.Tech in machine design from University BDT College of Engineering, Davangere. I have been awarded Gold Medal for securing the first position in Master of Technology in Visvesvaraya Technological University Belagavi, 2018. Research interest are fatigue and fracture analysis, tribology, composite materials and structures. I have 1ed 3 articles in international journals and 4 papers in national conferences. I have 1.6 years of Industry experience prior to academic. I was worked as a quality engineer at Indo Auto- Tech Pvt Ltd., Narasapura, Karnataka and Apprentice Trainee in Davangere Sugar Company Ltd., Kukkawada, Karnatka.

raw.About: Professor at the Department of Management Studies with 4 years of Industry and 17 years of teaching experience. He was previously the program coordinator and Associate Professor at the Department of Hotel Management,Christ University. In addition he is also a certified Wine trainer from the Globally acclaimed Wine and Spirit Educational Trust,London,UK. He has conducted various curated sessions on Hospitality in Manipal University. He is also on the Board of Examiners for Mysore University, compiled programme materials for Madurai Kamaraj Kamaraj. On a professional front, he is also a trainer for various Beverage Marketing companies. He has visited Taylors University,Malaysia for fostering Academic tie-ups and strengthen inter-University research publications in 2012. Visited Singapore to attend the Food Asia Summit in 2009, to understand contemporary food and beverage trends. He has also organized several national and international conferences along with conducting workshops for Government Immigration officers, and conducting Quality improvement programmes for enhanced academic rigor.

She has actively participated and organized many conferences, case study competition, E summits, FDP's, seminars, workshops and symposiums. She has conducted training projects like train the trainers for Election Commission of India. She has taught advanced graduate and Post Graduate courses spanning across the various subjects related to Human resources, Industrial Relations and organizational behavior. Her research interest is in Training and development, Academic Quality, Workplace spiritualism, Organizational Culture and labor laws. raw.About: Dr. Anitha Jandhyala is an accomplished academic with over 22 years of teaching experience in Mathematics and allied disciplines. She holds a Ph.D. from Vellore Institute of Technology, where her research focused on “Multi-Objective Optimization using Statistical and Soft Computing Techniques in Electro Discharge Machining.” Her academic journey includes a Master’s in Mathematics from JNTU Hyderabad, an M.Phil. from Madurai Kamaraj University, a B.Ed. from Bangalore University, and an MBA from Madurai Kamaraj University. Dr. Anitha has previously served as an Assistant Professor at PES University and as an Adjunct Professor at New Jersey City University, USA, where she taught Pre-Calculus and Calculus to management students. Since January 2021, she has been serving as an Associate Professor at PES University, Bangalore. Her teaching interests span mathematics education, optimization techniques, and the integration of statistical and computational methods in applied research.

name: Dr. Biplab Sarkar
text: Name: Dr. Biplab Sarkar | Department: Management Studies | Campus: RR | Research: Public Policy Development Economics Economics of Discrimination Applied Econometrics | Expertise/Teaching: R-Programming Foundation Predictive Analytics Financial Econometrics Managerial Economics | Active Projects: Guiding one Ph.D. student and fifteen post-graduate students at PES University | Responsibilities: Research Coordinator Member in Doctoral Committee (1) and Dissertation Committee at PES University Member in Departmental Curriculum Committee (DCC) Club Coordinator - Business Analytics | Bio: Dr. Biplab Sarkar has an economics degree from the University of North Bengal, Darjeeling. He, later on, completed his Ph.D. from the Indian Statistical Institute, Bangalore. As a teacher, he has taught courses like statistics, applied econometrics, R-programming, predictive analytics, research methodology, micro and macroeconomics for M.Sc. (Applied Economics) and MBA students. His primary research area is at the intersection between policy and development economics. He has presented his research work in national and international conferences including the World Association for Political Economy (WAPE) Conference at the Federal University of Santa Catarina(UFSC), Florianopolis, Brazil, and the Association for Regional Agriculture and Forestry Economics (ARAE) conference at the Okayama Uni... | Recent Pubs: Sarkar, Biplab, Ramachandran, V K and Swaminathan, Madhura (2014), "Aspects of the Political Economy of Crop Incomes in India", World Review of Political Economy, Vol. 5, No. 3. raw.About: Dr. Biplab Sarkar has an economics degree from the University of North Bengal, Darjeeling. He, later on, completed his Ph.D. from the Indian Statistical Institute, Bangalore. As a teacher, he has taught courses like statistics, applied econometrics, R-programming, predictive analytics, research methodology, micro and macroeconomics for M.Sc. (Applied Economics) and MBA students. His primary research area is at the intersection between policy and development economics. He has presented his research work in national and international conferences including the World Association for Political Economy (WAPE) Conference at the Federal University of Santa Catarina(UFSC), Florianopolis, Brazil, and the Association for Regional Agriculture and Forestry Economics (ARAE) conference at the Okayama University, Japan. He has also served as a consultant to the Foundation for Agrarian Studies (FAS), M S Swaminathan Research Foundation (MSSRF), and World Food Programme (WFP), leading organizations facilitate research on rural and development issues.

raw.Additional Information: Academics: Teaching & Research in mainstream Post Graduate Management education field contributing to the skillset development of budding managers of tomorrow. Business Development: Reviewing and interpreting the competition after in-depth analysis of market information to fine-tune the marketing strategies and escalate business volumes. Driving business growth through identification & penetration of new market segments for attainment of periodical targets with a view to optimize revenue. Profit Center Management: To ensure a proper P&L account management and the profitability of the cost centre. Team Management: Leading, training & monitoring the performance of team members to ensure efficiency in sales operations and meeting of individual & group targets

raw.About: Dr. Krishna Kumar S, an accomplished Associate Professor with a passion for driving excellence in higher education and the world of finance. Currently, I have the privilege of leading the Centre for Investment in Capital Markets, where we offer Certification courses, conduct Investment analysis, and engage in cutting-edge Research within the dynamic realm of capital markets. My expertise encompasses a broad spectrum, including equities, derivatives, accounting, and financial econometrics. I thrive on harnessing the power of data analysis to extract actionable insights, utilizing an impressive array of analytical tools such as EViews, R, Tally ERP, STATA, IBM SPSS, SPSS-AMOS, JMP, and Smart PLS. This skill enables me to uncover meaningful patterns within intricate financial data, setting me apart as a leading expert in the field. My key areas of research focus on Market Microstructures, Corporate Finance Issues, and Derivatives Modeling. I am deeply committed to advancing knowledge in these diverse areas, pushing the boundaries of understanding in finance. My research not only contributes to academic discourse but also holds practical implications for businesses and financial institutions. Beyond my technical prowess, I am a dedicated educator with a fervor for bridging the gap between theory and practice. I leverage educational technology and instructional design to create engaging learning experiences, equipping students with valuable practical skills. My commitment to cultivating a dynamic classroom environment that fosters critical thinking and active participation has garnered recognition from both students and peers. My academic journey culminated in a PhD in Finance, where I refined my exceptional ability to dissect complex financial concepts and make them accessible to diverse audiences. I am unwavering in my dedication to empowering the next generation of finance professionals with the knowledge and tools they need to excel in today's ever-evolving business landscape.

raw.Additional Information: LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT: Training Consultant: As a Training Consultant, He has designed and delivered sessions on Managerial effectiveness and leadership development programs. He was part of the executive Education program at XIME and the MDP Coordinator. He has conducted more than 50 Management Development Programs for corporate executives in areas like Interpersonal Effectiveness, Becoming a Manager, Conflict to Collaboration, Collaborative Leadership, and Transactional Analysis: Interpersonal and Communication Skills, Presentation Skills, Team Management, Time Management, Stress Management, and Campus to Corporate. Core Areas in MDP: Interpersonal Effectiveness, Communication and Presentation Skills, Leadership, Emotional Intelligence, Team building, Conflict Management, Campus to Corporate, Career Guidance, Counseling Psychology, and Psychological well-being. CONSULTING: He has consulted extensively for both Indian and multinational companies in the field of Leadership development. He has designed, developed, and delivered programs to build the leadership pipeline for organizations. He has also designed and delivered the “Summer- Leadership Program” – a leadership development program exclusively for the youth leaders in business in collaboration with HAL, and BHEL senior leaders. Designed and Delivered more than 75 MDPs and FDPs and Soft Skills Training programs at various Industries as well as in Educational institutes.

raw.About: Dr.Lucas M - is a Associate Professor @ PES University in the Department of MBA and formerly he served as Senior Assistant Professor at Xavier Institute of Management and Entrepreneurship and prior to this formerly he was with Ramaiah Institute of Management Studies from 2008-2018. He received his PhD in Human Capital Management from Alagappa University, karaikudi, Tamilnadu. He is specialized in HR, OB and Labour Law and has undergone practical Laboratory training in Applied Psychology. He has 20 years of both Industry and Academic experience. He has undergone his training in International certification in Training Skills conducted by Middle Earth consultants from Hyderabad which is associated with City and Guild, London. He has conducted Soft Skills Training program and MDP for young Engineers in HAL and for Software Engineers at BAe HAL and in BHEL and delivered more than 75 MDP and FDP Trainings. Designed and delivered more than 20 orientation programs in Karnataka Judicial Academy to the second division Assistants, Govt. Lawyers, Junior Judges, Civil Judges - Junior Division, Civil judges, Senior Civil Judges, District Judges and fast track court Judges in the area of Team Building, Stress and Time management, Human Resources and Management skills in the Judiciary (2008-2013). More than 35 paper publications in leading Management journals of repute indexed by Scopus and UGC care listed Journals.

In addition to his academic work, Bhaskar is actively involved in student mentorship, industry-academia collaborations, and practical learning initiatives. He regularly guides stud...

raw.name: Dr. Bhaskar Sailesh
raw.title: Assistant Professor
raw.About: Dr. Bhaskar Sailesh is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Hospitality and Event Management at PES University, Bangalore. His academic and research interests encompass a wide range of areas including sustainable tourism development, event management, hospitality operations, organizational behavior, and the integration of emerging technologies such as AI and analytics in the tourism and hospitality sectors. He has authored several research papers and book chapters on topics such as coastal tourism resilience, digital branding, employee motivation in luxury hotels, and technology-driven climate adaptation. In addition to his academic work, Bhaskar is actively involved in student mentorship, industry-academia collaborations, and practical learning initiatives. He regularly guides students through live event projects, research assignments, and skill development workshops, fostering a strong link between theoretical knowledge and real-world application. His approach emphasizes interdisciplinary learning, global perspectives, and preparing students for the dynamic demands of the hospitality, tourism, and events industries.

name: Deepak Shyam
text: Name: Deepak Shyam | Department: Management Studies | Campus: RR | Research: Marketing Management & its allied areas Supply Chain Management Strategic Management Marketing Strategy Digital Transformation | Expertise/Teaching: Marketing Strategy Retail Marketing Supply Chain Management Strategic Management Marketing Management Digital Transformation | Responsibilities: Media related activities Public Relations PESU Academy coordinator PESU Academy coordinator International Conference - Member | Bio: Prof Deepak Shyam has a degree in Telecommunications Engineering from Bangalore University and a Masters in International Business from PSGIM, Coimbatore. raw.About: As an individual, I am focused, driven, and passionate about everything I do. I am committed to continuous learning and development, both professionally and personally, and I believe in leading by example. I believe in a hands-on approach to learning, which is reflected in my passion for organizing intra-university and inter-university management fests, coordinating sports activities for the students of the management department, conducting research on various management concerns, and working along with students to find optimum solutions for the issues. I have also helped students generate new business ideas and kick-start their businesses. As an Assistant Professor in Business Management at PES University, Bangalore. I am a driven and dedicated individual who is passionate about developing a curriculum that is industry-centric, producing competitive business leaders, and achieving experiential learning through industry and academic networking. I have had the privilege of serving as the Chief Operations Leader of CODISTA Taekwondo Academy in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. My primary goal was to develop the organization holistically, and I achieved this by reducing the operating expenses by 50%, improving the quality of training and coaches by changing coach to student ratio from 1:40 to 3:40, and training and developing the existing human resources to achieve a 20% improvement in productivity. Additionally, I diversified the academy's products and services, established an online presence through social media, and developed efficient SOPs for processes, reducing the operation cost by 30%. Before my role as Chief Operations Leader of CODISTA, I worked as the Regional (South India) Business Manager at Bhaichung Bhutia Football Schools in Bangalore. I maintained a positive PnL even during Covid times, minimized expenses by 50%, and generated revenue through online training strategies contributing 80% of total sales. I successfully opened two new training centers and four inactive centers in my region and retained unsatisfied users with a 60% retention rate. During my time at Reliance Trends, Kochi, I served as the Store/Cluster Manager. I recruited and supervised ten quality staff with an attrition rate of 10% in 2020 and organized eight pieces of training on multiple topics to upskill employees. I exceeded the revenue objectives for the year 2020, maintained the stock accuracy level of 91%, and contributed 20% of total sales from AJIO. I have also worked as a Part-Time Professor at Padmashree Institute of Management and Sciences, Bangalore, where I developed two management training programs for BBA and B.Com students, trained 30 MBA students on the Performance Management System, and developed a curriculum to cultivate entrepreneurial skills and moral courage in students. I also conducted two sessions of physical activity for BBA and B.Com students per week and made over 500 cold calls for admission generation with three average leads per day. My education includes a Bachelor of Technology degree in Business Management with Computer Application and a Master of Business Administration degree in Marketing and Human Resources from Bharathiar University. I am passionate about continuing my learning journey.

raw.About: Prof. Sujay C holds an MBA in Marketing and an M.Phil in Management, and is currently pursuing his Ph.D. with a focus on Marketing. With over 10 years of combined academic and industry experience, he brings a strong blend of academic depth and applied perspective. He serves as the Placement Coordinator for the BBA and BBA Business Analytics programs at PES University and works with national and international organizations to support Hackathon-based learning. His research interests include consumer behaviour, sustainability, and data-driven social media marketing, with publications in Scopus and ABDC indexed journals, along with presentations at national and international conferences. He has been involved in designing and teaching core courses, supporting the organization of academic events with industry participation, and contributing to institutional-level collaborations. His professional philosophy emphasizes experiential and case-based learning that integrates academic rigor with practical relevance to prepare students for the evolving business world.

name: Dr. Raghavendra Rao K
text: Name: Dr. Raghavendra Rao K | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: RR | Research: Nonlinear and Quantum Optics Quantum Computation and Information | Expertise/Teaching: Engineering Physics Theory and Lab Quantum Computation and Game Theory | Responsibilities: Teaching and Research Anchor Physics Digital Coordinator S & H Research Guide for PhD Students Ideathon Chief Coordinator | Bio: I am trained as an experimental physicist in the area of Nonlinear and Quantum Optics. My current research interests cover Quantum Mechanics, Quantum Computation and Quantum Information. My broader interests cover the inter- relations of Physics, Mathematics and Philosophy. I run a research lab- "Nonlinear and Quantum Optics". I have given online lectures on "The theoretical minima of Quantum Mechanics, Q-Computation and Q-Game Theory". | Career History: Associate Professor, PES University, 2014 - March 2024 PhD Scholar, IISc, 2009 - 2014 Lecturer, Senior Lecturer, PES Institute of Technology, 2000 - 2009 Professor, PES University, 2024 - Present | Recent Pubs: Entanglement-decoherence-Nash equilibria diagrams in quantum games. name: Dr. Shankar B M
text: Name: Dr. Shankar B M | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: RR | Research: Hydrodynamic stability Applied and Computational Mathematics | Expertise/Teaching: Teaching Master of Technology and Bachelor of Technology Courses since 2011. | Active Projects: PES Internal Funding Project- "Instability mechanism of magnetic nanofluids in a non-isothermal convective flow" | Responsibilities: Faculty Adviser Doctoral Committee Member Student Welfare Coordinator Test Coordinator Atmatrisha Chief Coordinator Anchor Teacher Sports Coordinator | Bio: Dr. B M Shankar is affiliated with the Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, where he works as a Professor of Mathematics. He has authored and co-authored several international publications and also worked as a reviewer for reputed professional journals. He has an active association with different societies and academies around the world. B M S's major research interests involve applied mathematics, hydrodynamic stability, fluid mechanics, and convection in porous media. | Career History: Associate Professor, PES University, 2018 - 2024 Assistant Professor, PES University, 2014 - 2018 Assistant Professor, PES Institute of Technology, 2011 - 2014 Professor, PES University, 2024 - Till date | Success: Junior Research Fellow in ISRO Respond Project. September 8, 2008 - September 7,2010 Senior Research Fellow in ISRO Respond Project. September 8, 2010 - August 11, 2011 One of my research articles entitled "Stability of double-diffusive natural convection in a vertical fluid layer" was chosen as the Editor's pick for the journal Physics of Fluids (2021). Selected as an Editorial Advisory Board for Heat Transfer-Wiley (2022-) Received "Award for Outstanding Research Publication" from Vision Group of Science and Technology (VGST), Government of Karnataka (2022-2023). raw.About: Dr. B M Shankar is affiliated with the Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, where he works as a Professor of Mathematics. He has authored and co-authored several international publications and also worked as a reviewer for reputed professional journals. He has an active association with different societies and academies around the world. B M S's major research interests involve applied mathematics, hydrodynamic stability, fluid mechanics, and convection in porous media.

raw.About: Dr Basavaraja B M is an Associate Professor in the Department of Science and Humanities at PES University, Bengaluru. He has interdisciplinary academic training in Chemistry and Psychology and has over a decade of experience in teaching, research, research supervision, and student mentoring. His academic work reflects a strong commitment to research-driven teaching, student development, and scholarly engagement.

name: Dr. Veerabhadraswamy M
text: Name: Dr. Veerabhadraswamy M | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: RR | Research: Green Chemistry and Green Engineering Green and Sustainable Products conversion of Biomass into Biofuel and platform chemicals | Expertise/Teaching: Engineering Chemistry | Active Projects: Developing Green Chemistry Resources: Expanding the Horizon of Green Chemistry and Green Engineering for Technical Education | Responsibilities: Anti-Ragging committee member Examination squad team member Student mentor Section In-charge IQAC chief coordinator, Dept. of S & H | Bio: Dr. Veerabhadraswamy Mruthyunjaya , (VBS) born in Bengaluru, did his Masters in Chemistry in the year 1994 and Ph. D., in 2002 from University of Mysore and obtained PG Diploma in Environmental Law in 2020 and Masters in Business Law (MBL) degree from National Law of Indian Universities, Bengaluru in the year 2017. Presently, he is working as Associate Professor of Chemistry, P E S University. His current research field engages green chemistry which includes conversion of biomass (non-edible seed cake and defatted rice bran) into bio-fuels, chemical intermediates using heterogeneous catalysts and conversion of waste to bio-composites. His projects have been funded by VTU Belagavi, AICTE New Delhi, and VGST-KIST (L1) Bengaluru. raw.About: Dr. Veerabhadraswamy Mruthyunjaya , (VBS) born in Bengaluru, did his Masters in Chemistry in the year 1994 and Ph. D., in 2002 from University of Mysore and obtained PG Diploma in Environmental Law in 2020 and Masters in Business Law (MBL) degree from National Law of Indian Universities, Bengaluru in the year 2017. Presently, he is working as Associate Professor of Chemistry, P E S University. His current research field engages green chemistry which includes conversion of biomass (non-edible seed cake and defatted rice bran) into bio-fuels, chemical intermediates using heterogeneous catalysts and conversion of waste to bio-composites. His projects have been funded by VTU Belagavi, AICTE New Delhi, and VGST-KIST (L1) Bengaluru. Dr. VBS has served as Post Doctoral Research Assistant under Dr. Gary N Sheldrake, Queen University Belfast, Belfast UK in the field of green technology (Supercritical fluid extraction). Dr. VBS has about three and half years of industrial research experience in the field of nutraceutical and natural products. In net shall, he has 25 years of vast experience as an academician, administrator and as researcher. Under his guidance two research students have obtained Ph D degrees from VTU, Belagavi, and presently guiding Ph. D students, PG and UG students. He has been actively involved in GREEN CHMISTRY DOMAN activity promotion. Dr. VBS has presented research articles in conferences and 1ed research papers in various International and Nations Journals, His recent innovation in the field of catalyst has resulted in filing patent. He has authored books and Book Chapters in the field of green chemistry and its applications. He has few honors and recognitions to his credits.

name: Dr. Naveen Kumar S B
text: Name: Dr. Naveen Kumar S B | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: RR | Research: convective instabilities in non-Newtonian fluids. | Expertise/Teaching: Engineering Mathematics for Master of Technology and Bachelor of Technology | Responsibilities: Faculty Advisor Section in charge Co-Anchor IQAC coordinator Doctrol Committee Member Faculty Advisor Section in-charge Anchor Syllabus committee Digital content preparation | Bio: Dr. Naveen Kumar S. B. received his Ph.D. degree from the Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University, Bangalore in 2014 and M.Phil degree from Alagappa University, Karaikudi. He is continuously engaged in the teaching profession for the last 17 years and he is presently working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Science and Humanities, PES University. His research interests are on convective instabilities in non-Newtonian fluids. He has 1ed 07 papers in reputed international journals. | Career History: Assistant Professor, PES University, July 24, 2014 - till date Assistant Professor, PES Institute of technology, 2011 - 2014 Lecturer, East Point College of Engineering & Technology, 2008 - 2011 Lecturer, AMC Engineering College, 2006 - 2008 Lecturer, Basaveshwara PU College, Bangalore, 2004 - 2006 | Recent Pubs: Electrorheological stability of parallel poorly conducting couple stress viscous fluid flow in a channel, International Journal of Applied Mathematics and Engineering Sciences, Vol 7, No. 1, pp. 41-54, 2013. I.S. Shivakumara, S.B. Naveen Kumar Linear and weakly nonlinear triple diffusive convection in a couple stress fluid layer, International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer, Vol. 68, 542-553, 2014. B.M. Shankar, Jai Kumar, I.S. Shivakumara, S.B. Naveen Kumar, Effect of horizontal AC electric field on the stability of natural convection in a vertical dielectric fluid layer. Journal of Applied Fluid Mechanics 9, pp. 3073-3086, 2016. B.M. Shankar, Jai Kumar, I.S. Shivakumara, S.B. Naveen Kumar, "MHD instability of pressure‑driven flow of a non‑Newtonian fluid", SN Applied Sciences, | https://doi.org/10.1007/s42452-019-1557-2, 2019. S.B. Naveen Kumar, I.S. Shivakumara and B.M. Shankar, "Exploration of Coriolis Force on the Linear Stability of Couple Stress Fluid Flow Induced by Double Diffusive Convection", Journal of Heat Transfer, 122502-8 / Vol. 141, 2019. S.B. Naveen Kumar, I.S. Shivakumara and B.M. Shankar, "Linear and Weakly Nonlinear Double-Diffusive Magnetoconvection in a Non-Newtonian Fluid Layer", Microgravity Science and Technology, https://doi.org/10.1007/s12217-020-09781-4, 2020.; Attended the Revised Syllabus on Engineering Mathematics I & II at Reva College of Engineering, Bangalore, 2007. Attended the Two Day Symposium on Recent Advances in Fluid Mechanics at UGC-Centre for Advanced Studies, Department of Mathematics, Central College Campus, Bangalore University, Bangalore, 2009. Attended the International Conference on Frontiers in Fluid Mechanics at UGC-CAS in Fluid Mechanics, Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University, Bangalore, during August 31-September 2, 2009, presented the paper. Attended the National Workshop on Advances in Lithium ion Battery Materials (ALBM-2015) at PES University, Bangalore-85, on 28th December 2015. Attended the National workshop on Advances in Lithium ion Battery Materials organized by Department of Sciences and Humanities, PES University during Dec 28, 2015. Attended the National conference on Recent Advances in Applied Sciences organized by AMC Engineering College, held during April 25, 2016. Attended the Faculty Development Program on Applications of Differential Equations in Engineering Problems conducted by Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, Bangalore, during July 20-22, 2017. Attended the workshop on Emerging Trends in Green Technologies conducted by Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, Bangalore, during July 5-7, 2018. Attended the National symposium on Mathematics and its Applications organized by Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University and presented the paper entitled Effect of rotation on the stability of double diffusive couple stress fluid layer held during April 27, 2019. Attended the International Conference on Mathematics and its Applications (ICMA-2020) organized by Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University and presented the paper entitled Linear and weakly non-linear double-diffusive Magnetoconvection in a non-Newtonian fluid saturated porous layer held during February 28-29,2020.

raw.Conferences: Attended the Revised Syllabus on Engineering Mathematics I & II at Reva College of Engineering, Bangalore, 2007. Attended the Two Day Symposium on Recent Advances in Fluid Mechanics at UGC-Centre for Advanced Studies, Department of Mathematics, Central College Campus, Bangalore University, Bangalore, 2009. Attended the International Conference on Frontiers in Fluid Mechanics at UGC-CAS in Fluid Mechanics, Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University, Bangalore, during August 31-September 2, 2009, presented the paper. Attended the National Workshop on Advances in Lithium ion Battery Materials (ALBM-2015) at PES University, Bangalore-85, on 28th December 2015. Attended the National workshop on Advances in Lithium ion Battery Materials organized by Department of Sciences and Humanities, PES University during Dec 28, 2015. Attended the National conference on Recent Advances in Applied Sciences organized by AMC Engineering College, held during April 25, 2016. Attended the Faculty Development Program on Applications of Differential Equations in Engineering Problems conducted by Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, Bangalore, during July 20-22, 2017. Attended the workshop on Emerging Trends in Green Technologies conducted by Department of Science and Humanities, PES University, Bangalore, during July 5-7, 2018. Attended the National symposium on Mathematics and its Applications organized by Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University and presented the paper entitled Effect of rotation on the stability of double diffusive couple stress fluid layer held during April 27, 2019. Attended the International Conference on Mathematics and its Applications (ICMA-2020) organized by Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University and presented the paper entitled Linear and weakly non-linear double-diffusive Magnetoconvection in a non-Newtonian fluid saturated porous layer held during February 28-29,2020.

raw.About: Dr. Naveen Kumar S. B. received his Ph.D. degree from the Department of Mathematics, Bangalore University, Bangalore in 2014 and M.Phil degree from Alagappa University, Karaikudi. He is continuously engaged in the teaching profession for the last 17 years and he is presently working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Science and Humanities, PES University. His research interests are on convective instabilities in non-Newtonian fluids. He has 1ed 07 papers in reputed international journals.

raw.About: Dr. Vijendra Kumar SK, has written more than 40 research articles in the field of psychology and management. He was awarded MTC Global Award for Excellence in Knowledge Sharing-2016. Another important work is BUSE Model for resolving intra-group conflicts within the system or organization. He rediscovered a meditation technique to heal the human chakras and body using Pancha Bhootas available online through eSanskriti

text: Name: Dr. Shruti Soudi | Department: Psychology | Campus: RR | Expertise/Teaching: Psychological Processes Life-Span Development Personality Psychology Positive Psychology Indian and Transpersonal Psychology Qualitative Research Methods Research Method labs Science of wellbeing | Bio: Dr. Shruti Soudi holds a PhD in Positive Psychology from Karnatak University and has a background in counseling psychology. Her academic journey includes a Master's degree in Counseling Psychology and a Master of Philosophy in Health Psychology from Karnatak University. Dr. Soudi has a diverse range of professional experiences. She has worked as a Mental Health Specialist at Inspiron Psychological Well-being Centre Pvt Ltd and as an Associate SME at Evelyn Learning Systems Pvt. Ltd. Additionally, she has been a Guest Associate Editor at Frontiers in Media Psychology since August 2023. Her research focuses on familial dynamics and parenting strategies, exploring their impact on children's emotional well-being. She has worked as a Mental Health Specialist at Inspiron Psychological Well-being Centre Pvt Ltd and as an Associate SME at Evelyn Learning Systems Pvt. Ltd. Additionally, she has been a Guest Associate Editor at Frontiers in Media Psychology since August 2023. Her research focuses on familial dynamics and parenting strategies, exploring their impact on children's emotional well-being. She has also contributed to various studies on topics such as personality, coping with stress, spirituality, self-esteem, and forgiveness among musicians and students.

Post Graduate with Masters of Science from SDM College, Mangalore University, in the year 2020 bagging second rank in academic achievement. Graduated with Bachelor of Arts from Acharya Institute of Graduate Studies, Bangalore University, in the year 2018 bagging Mrs. Mary Kodananda Rao prize for having secured highest marks in under graduation. Participates in continued learning through conferences and professional research. Qualified GATE by IIT Kanpur 2023 with All India Rank 581 to pursue my research interests and expertise that revolve around the study of lived experience, qualitative and mixed-methods exploration of adolescent and young adults’ mental health, career choice, family influence in the Indian socio-cultural context.

raw.About: Shreya Ghosh is an Assistant Professor and dedicated PhD scholar in Psychology, specializing in Counselling and Industrial Psychology. She holds a master’s degree in psychology and is certified in Counselling, Hypnotherapy, Industrial Psychology, and HR Management. With clinical experience from Spandana Hospital Pvt. Ltd., she has worked closely with psychiatric patients, building strong therapeutic and communication skills. Passionate about Counselling Psychology, she is committed to promoting emotional well-being and student development. Ms.Ghosh has completed professional training in Counselling and Guidance (Samadhana Counselling Centre & PES University), Basics of Hypnotherapy (PES University), Industrial Psychology (Chanakya Mental Health Services), HR Management (Chanakya Mentoring Platform), and has also successfully completed the Faculty Development Program under MRD CFLD. She leads the “Mind Talks” and heads the Media Club of the Psychology Department, actively fostering mentorship, emotional awareness, and student engagement. A Gold Medallist in Handball and an accomplished dancer, she strongly believes in holistic development through academic, athletic, and creative pursuits.

raw.name: Srishti Muralidharan
raw.title: Assistant Professor
raw.About: Prof. Srishti is a Postgraduate in Clinical Psychology with specialized training in psychotherapy. She is a practicing therapist with extensive experience delivering individualized psychological interventions across diverse populations. Alongside her clinical work, she has significant industry experience, collaborating with mental health organizations, educational institutions, and wellness programs to design and implement evidence-based interventions. Her professional journey is deeply rooted in a passion for teaching and mentoring the next generation of psychologists. She integrates her clinical and industry expertise into academic settings, fostering a dynamic and application-oriented learning environment that encourages critical thinking and compassion in students. She is also a published author, with multiple research papers and articles to her credit in the fields of clinical psychology, mental health, and therapeutic interventions. A dedicated advocate for mental wellness, Prof. Srishti actively contributes to community service initiatives and awareness campaigns. Her areas of interest inlude Indian Psychology, Social Psychology, Neuropsychology, Personality Psychology and Psychotherapy.

raw.About: Dr. M. Farida Begam completed Ph.D., in Computer Science and Engineering in Bharathidasan University, India, in 2015 received M.Tech in Computer Science, from the National Institute of Technology, Trichy, India in 2006 and pursued her bachelor's degree B.E in Computer Science and Engineering in Mookambigai College of Engineering, Bharathidasan University, Trichy in 1998. She had worked as a Professor and Head of the Department, Information Science and Engineering at CMR Institute of Technology, Bangalore. She is a Senior IEEE Member. Dr. Farida is an academician for 26 years and published Scopus indexed papers in reputed Journals and Conferences. She is passionate in continuous teaching-learning processes and involved in research related student centric learning methodologies. She worked in University of Bolton, RAK, U.A.E as an Adjunct Professor. She worked as an Adjunct Faculty in Higher Colleges of Technology Dubai Women’s College, Murdoch University, Dubai and as a Senior Lecturer in the Department of Engineering and Information Technology, Manipal University Dubai Campus and handled various IT related basic and advanced courses. She also had industry experience and worked as a Technical Evangelist in the Education and Research department in Infosys Technologies Ltd. India. She is a Cisco Certified Network associate (CCNA) and handled CCNA training courses in Manipal University Dubai Campus. Her research domain includes Machine/Deep Learning, NLP, Semantic Web and Knowledge Management.

raw.About: Dr. Sharavana K. is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering (UG Studies) at P E S University, Bangalore. He earned his Bachelor's degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) in 2004, a Master's degree from Sathyabama University, Chennai, in 2009, and holds a Ph.D. in High-Performance Computing (HPC) in Cloud Computing from VTU. With over 18 years of teaching experience and one year of research experience, Dr. Sharavana has contributed extensively to various journals, and national and international conferences. As an educator, he has taught courses such as Cloud Computing, Information Security, Advanced Computer Networks for M.Tech, and Application Development using Python, Unix and Shell, System Programming, Computer Networks, Object-Oriented Programming with C++/Java, and Web Programming for B.Tech students. His research interests focus on High-Performance Computing in Cloud Computing, Building a Frameworks for Virtual HPC Cloud Computing, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks, IoT, and Data Science.

raw.Additional Information: Placement Office - PESU EC Campus : 080-6618 6603 Mobile Number: 9986265779 As the Faculty Placement Coordinator, my role is to bridge the gap between students and potential employers. I work closely with faculty, staff, and industry partners to identify internship and job opportunities that align with students' academic pursuits. My aim is to facilitate successful placements and prepare students for their professional careers. As the Faculty Internship Coordinator, I oversee and facilitate our internship program, aligning opportunities with students' academic objectives, collaborating with industry partners, and providing essential support to bridge the gap between education and career readiness.

raw.About: With 15 years of academic experience and an additional 2 years of industry expertise, Prof. Animesh brings a well-rounded perspective to the role of Computer Science Engineering faculty and Faculty Placement & Internship Coordinator. Extensive background in academia equips Prof. Animesh with a deep understanding of the educational needs and aspirations of students, allowing for the effective bridging of the gap between classroom learning and real-world application. The 2 years of industry experience provide valuable insights into the demands and expectations of the professional world, which Prof. Animesh leverages to prepare students for successful careers. As a Placement & Internship Coordinator, Prof. Animesh is dedicated to establishing strong industry partnerships, crafting meaningful internship opportunities, and providing students with the guidance and support needed to excel in their chosen fields. The commitment is to empower students with the skills and knowledge necessary for a seamless transition from academia to industry, ultimately contributing to their career success.

name: Dr. Chandrashekhar P Chavan
text: Name: Dr. Chandrashekhar P Chavan | Department: Computer Science | Campus: EC | Research: Wireless Networks, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks (MANETs), IoT, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML), Cloud Computing, Ubiquitous Networks, Network Security, Pervasive Computing, Context-Aware Systems, and Post-Quantum Cryptography | Expertise/Teaching: Computer Networks Data Structure using C Operating System Design and Analysis of Algorithm Big Data Database Management System Algorithms for Information Retrieval C programming Python programming Research Methodology C++ Programming Go Programming Language | Active Projects: "Connectionless Vending Machine Using Encrypted QR Code" Chandrashekhar Pomu Chavan, Prajwala Talanki Ranganath, Guram Balaji, Bharath Basawaraj Reddy, Pradeep Rajanna Shetty Sathish, Rachana Bajegundi Ganesh, Roopashree Shreedhar, Sai Ganesh Boya, Sandhya Govindaraju, Shrinivas Venkatesh Kachwar. Indian Patent Number: 556401, Application Number: 202441033531. Date Granted: 17 December 2024. | Responsibilities: Coordinator for the Heal-O-Code Hackathon Coordinator for Google Developer Student Club (GDSC) Coordinator for the Codechef Club Coordinator for InGenius 11.0 Hackathon Coordinator for Parallax Club Head of all the clubs at PES University, EC Campus | Bio: Dr. Chandrashekhar P Chavan received his B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College, Bidar, Karnataka, India, and his M.Tech degree in Network and Internet Engineering from Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, Mysore, Karnataka, India, where he secured the 3rd rank in the university. He later earned his Ph.D. in the field of Wireless Networking from the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore, India. His core research interests include Wireless Networks, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks (MANETs), IoT, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML), Cloud Computing, Ubiquitous Networks, Network Security, Pervasive Computing, Context-Aware Systems, and Post-Quantum Cryptography. | Career History: Associate Professor, Dept of CSE, PES University, Bangalore, March 24, 2023 - Current Visiting faculty, Wipro Technologies, WILP program in association with BITS, Pilani, 2019 - Current Visiting Faculty, Wipro Technologies WISTA program in collaboration with the VIT, Vellore, 2014 - 2021 Assistant Professor, Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering, Bangalore, 2009 - 2010 Software Engineer, Innova... | Success: I have been awarded University Third Rank holder in MTech by the VTU, Belgaum in 2008 Best Outgoing M.Tech Student Award from Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering , Mysore (NAAC A) in 2008 Certificate of Excellence in 10th board by Bandhu Prakashan, Dharwad in 1997 Certificate of Excellence in 10th board by Vikram Prakashan, Dharwad in 1997 Third Rank in Karnataka State Level General Knowledge Competition conducted in the year 1997 Certificate for Excellence in Science State Level Talent Examination in 1995 Best Paper Award for our work "Malware Detection Using Ensemble Learning And File Monitoring" in IEEE ICSTSN 2023, 2nd International Conference on Smart Technologies and Systems for Next Generation Computing. raw.About: Dr. Chandrashekhar P Chavan received his B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College, Bidar, Karnataka, India, and his M.Tech degree in Network and Internet Engineering from Sri Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, Mysore, Karnataka, India, where he secured the 3rd rank in the university. He later earned his Ph.D. in the field of Wireless Networking from the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore, India. His core research interests include Wireless Networks, Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks (MANETs), IoT, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML), Cloud Computing, Ubiquitous Networks, Network Security, Pervasive Computing, Context-Aware Systems, and Post-Quantum Cryptography.

raw.Additional Information: Academic Interests: Dr. Gokulakrishnan’s areas of academic and research interest include Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, Human–Computer Interaction, and Web Technologies. His work emphasizes scalable, data-driven solutions with real-world relevance. Professional Contributions: He has delivered several advanced courses, including Research Methodology, Responsible AI Ethics in Computing, and Human–Computer Interaction, for undergraduate and postgraduate programs. Publications & Scholarly Output: Dr. Gokulakrishnan has published numerous articles, papers, and conference presentations in both international journals and archival conferences indexed in Web of Science (WoS) and Scopus. His research spans topics such as AI in recruitment processes and data science applications. Books / Academic Resources: He has contributed to academic resources, including works on Data Science fundamentals and teaching materials related to Linux systems and Human–Computer Interaction. Editorial & Review Roles: Dr. Gokulakrishnan serves as a peer reviewer and editorial contributor for international conferences and journals, contributing to academic quality and scholarly dissemination. Industry & Academic Engagement: As an active academician, he participates in workshops, curriculum development initiatives, and academic committees to foster research culture and high standards in computing education.

raw.About: Dr. Gokulakrishnan S is an Associate Professor in the field of Computer Science, with over 19 years of academic experience encompassing teaching, research, and academic administration. He completed his Postdoctoral Research in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics in 2022 at Ton Duc Thang University and the Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. His postdoctoral work focused on advanced AI methodologies and data-driven analytical frameworks. Dr. Gokulakrishnan earned his Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Computer Science and Engineering in 2021 from Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Tamil Nadu. His doctoral research specialized in Cloud Computing, with an emphasis on system scalability, efficiency, and performance optimization. He holds both a Bachelor’s degree and a Master’s degree in Information Technology, providing a strong academic foundation in computing technologies and systems. Dr. Gokulakrishnan has made significant scholarly contributions through publications in Web of Science (WoS) and Scopus-indexed journals, and through presentations at several international conferences. His research reflects a balance between theoretical rigor and practical applicability. In addition to his research contributions, he is a committed educator and mentor, dedicated to academic excellence and the professional development of students. His teaching philosophy emphasizes critical thinking, innovation, and preparedness for emerging challenges in the digital and technological landscape.

raw.About: Dr. P. Kavitha is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. She received her Ph.D. from Anna University, Chennai, India, for her research on Anomaly-based Intrusion Detection in 802.11 Networks with Optimal Feature Selection. With an academic career that began in December 1998, she brings over 23 years of rich experience in teaching and research. She is a recognized Research Supervisor at Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) and PES University, Karnataka, and has successfully guided two doctoral scholars under VTU. Her research interests span Network security, Anomaly detection, Machine Learning and Feature optimization in wireless networks. Dr. Kavitha is a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) and IEEE (India). Her commitment to advancing knowledge, mentoring young researchers, and contributing to the academic community has earned her recognition as a dedicated teacher and researcher.

raw.About: Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at PES University. Educational background includes a B.E. in Computer Science from Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, an M.Tech in Software Engineering from PES Institute of Technology, Bengaluru (secured University Second Rank under VTU, Belgaum), and a Ph.D. in Meteorological Data Analysis from VTU. Research interests include Data Mining, Data Analytics, and Machine Intelligence. Experienced in mentoring student projects and contributing research publications in reputed journals and conferences. Currently engaged in Post-Doctoral Research at the Federal University of Santa Maria (UFSM), Brazil, focusing on data-driven methods in the field of environmental informatics . Committed to fostering academic excellence and promoting innovation through interdisciplinary research and teaching.

raw.Additional Information: Professional Membership: CSI (Computer Society of India)-Life Member since 2013. Deepti.C is currently working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science Engineering , PES University EC Campus ,Bengaluru, India. She is currently pursuing PhD in Computer Science Engineering at Visvesvaraya Technological University(VTU). She has completed her B.E., degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University(VTU),Belgaum, India in 2004. She obtained her M.Tech degree in Computer Network Engineering from Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, , Visvesvaraya Technological University(VTU),Belgaum, India in 2009. She has over 15 years of teaching experience in various Engineering Colleges. She is a life member of Computer Society of India(CSI).Her area of interest includes Computer Networks, Internet of Things and Wireless Sensor Networks.

name: Lenish Pramiee
text: Name: Lenish Pramiee | Department: Computer Science | Campus: EC | Bio: Lenish Pramiee is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at PES University, EC Campus, Bengaluru, India. With a strong academic background in Information Technology (B.Tech., C.S.I Institute of Technology, 2008; M.Tech., Francis Xavier College of Engineering, 2010), Lenish has built over seven years of experience in teaching, research, and guiding student innovations in emerging technologies. Her research spans Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, IoT-based systems, Blockchain applications, and Computer Vision, with a particular focus on applying these technologies to socially impactful domains such as medical imaging, agriculture, sports analytics, cybersecurity, and smart transportation. | Career History: Assistant Professor, Gopalan College of Engineering, 2017 - 2020 Assistant Professor, The Oxford College Of Engineering, 2021 - 2024 Assistant Professor, PES University, EC Campus, 2024 - Till date | Success: Elite certificate- "Deep Learning" NPTEL-AICTE- IIT, Kharagpur Elite certificate - “Introduction to Machine Learning” NPTEL-AICTE- IIT, Kharagpur Elite certificate “IOT industrial revolution 4.0” NPTEL-AICTE- IIT, Kharagpur Elite certificate- “Introduction to Python “ NPTEL -IIT, Kharagpur linkedin.com/in/lenish-pramiee-05776612a

raw.About: Lenish Pramiee is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at PES University, EC Campus, Bengaluru, India. With a strong academic background in Information Technology (B.Tech., C.S.I Institute of Technology, 2008; M.Tech., Francis Xavier College of Engineering, 2010), Lenish has built over seven years of experience in teaching, research, and guiding student innovations in emerging technologies. Her research spans Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, IoT-based systems, Blockchain applications, and Computer Vision, with a particular focus on applying these technologies to socially impactful domains such as medical imaging, agriculture, sports analytics, cybersecurity, and smart transportation.

Conducted various Workshops in the college for the benefit of students and faculties. In past years, ICICI Trinity launch is organized under my mentorship in college premises. Was member of BOE (Board of Examination) deputed by University in 2012. Actively participated in BOS meetings and was responsible for developing Course material for one stream (Databases) in MCA curriculum (2013). Conducted Departmental Annual Fest ( for MCA) Esperanza from 2013 to 2017. Took students for Industrial visits to Infosys and CISCO in 2011 and 2012 Currently Heading CSE( AI & ML) Department at Electronic City Campus, Bengaluru | Bio: Dr. Arti is Professor and Chairperson of CSE(AI & ML), EC Campus. She completed her B.Sc. (Hons) in Mathematics in 1994 and M.Sc. in Mathematics in 1996 from Delhi University. She later earned her M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering from Allahabad Agricultural University and received her Ph.D. in Computer Science Engineering from the Faculty of Technology and Engineering at Maharishi Dayanand University, Rohtak, Haryana, in 2009. She served as a Professor and Head of the MCA Department at PESIT, Bangalore South Campus, until August 2020. Since then, she has been a Professor in the Department of Computer Science Engineering at PES University.
