raw.Responsibilities: Currently serving as Professor in CSE Dept since Aug 2020. Currently mentoring 15 Undergraduate Project Batches Heading a domain of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science in the Department. Headed MCA dept., involved in all administrative departmental work, coordinating functioning of department properly. As HoD, did all department related activities for uplifting the department. Conducted various Workshops in the college for the benefit of students and faculties. In past years, ICICI Trinity launch is organized under my mentorship in college premises. Was member of BOE (Board of Examination) deputed by University in 2012. Actively participated in BOS meetings and was responsible for developing Course material for one stream (Databases) in MCA curriculum (2013). Conducted Departmental Annual Fest ( for MCA) Esperanza from 2013 to 2017. Took students for Industrial visits to Infosys and CISCO in 2011 and 2012 Currently Heading CSE( AI & ML) Department at Electronic City Campus, Bengaluru
raw.Research Guidance: Currently guiding 2 Research Scholars in the area of Natural Language Processing and Recommendation Engines (Machine Learning) One Research Scholar was conferred PhD under my guidance as a co-guide in the area of Customer Relationship Management Using Machine Learning.
raw.Research Interest: Research Interests include: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Natural Language Processing, Graph Neural Networks, Data Mining, Mathematical aspects of AI

raw.About: Dr. Arti is Professor and Chairperson of CSE(AI & ML), EC Campus. She completed her B.Sc. (Hons) in Mathematics in 1994 and M.Sc. in Mathematics in 1996 from Delhi University. She later earned her M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering from Allahabad Agricultural University and received her Ph.D. in Computer Science Engineering from the Faculty of Technology and Engineering at Maharishi Dayanand University, Rohtak, Haryana, in 2009. She served as a Professor and Head of the MCA Department at PESIT, Bangalore South Campus, until August 2020. Since then, she has been a Professor in the Department of Computer Science Engineering at PES University. With over 25 years of academic experience, including 16 years dedicated to research, Dr. Arya’s expertise spans Spatial Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Graph Neural Networks, Generative AI, Unstructured Data Management, Applied Numerical Methods, and Biostatistics. She is a Senior Member of IEEE, a life member of CSI and IAENG. Additionally, she serves on the reviewer board of several reputed international journals, including SNAM (Springer, Scopus indexed) and IJCDS (Scopus indexed). Dr. Arya has approximately 95+ publications in various esteemed international conferences and journals. She is currently guiding 2 PhD scholars and 2 have already completed in the area of natural language processing and spatial data mining. She has supervised approximately 200 undergraduate students for various research projects. Further details can be found on her LinkedIn profile https:// in.linkein.com/in/artiarya.

raw.About: A passionate academician with over 20 years of rich experience in teaching, research, and academic leadership, currently serving as an Associate Professor in the Department of CSE(AI&ML) at PES University, EC Campus, Bangalore. My core research interests lie in Cybersecurity, Blockchain, Internet of Things (IoT), Machine Learning applications in Security, Wireless Sensor Networks, Adhoc Networks, and Data Science. I have made significant scholarly contributions with 18 research publications in reputed refereed journals and 30 papers presented at national and international conferences. Throughout my career, I have demonstrated a strong commitment to academic excellence by guiding more than 60 undergraduate project batches and over 15 postgraduate research projects. Actively organized Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), technical workshops, and seminars on emerging technologies and has been a sought-after guest speaker and seminar resource person in various institutions. An active member of leading professional bodies including IEEE, ACM, IE(India), and ISTE. Known for passion for mentoring and research-driven teaching, continues to inspire students and contribute to advancing the frontiers of computing and intelligent systems.

raw.About: I am Dr. Kokila Paramanandam, currently working as an Associate Professor in the Department of CSE-AIML at PES University, Bangalore. I bring over 16 years of academic experience, and my teaching portfolio spans a diverse range of subjects including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Cloud Computing, and Computer Networks & Security among some others. My research interests are centered around Artificial Intelligence, Explainable AI, Computer Vision, Cloud Computing, and the Internet of Things. I’ve published my work extensively in SCI-indexed journals and leading international conferences, and I also hold a patent in the domain of Artificial Intelligence. Beyond teaching and research, I actively contribute to institutional development through roles such as Program Coordinator and Academic Committee Member. I’ve organized and supported various technical events, guest lectures, and student hackathons, and have also served as an External Deputy Chief Superintendent (DCS) for VTU Theory Examinations across multiple engineering colleges in Bangalore. I’m passionate about continuous faculty development and regularly take part in FDPs and technical workshops. I’m technically proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Keras, OpenCV, MATLAB, and scikit-learn, with deep expertise in AI/ML and image processing tools. I’m a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) and have been recognized for my contributions in academic mentoring, curriculum development, and technical design. I’ve had the opportunity to guide several innovative and socially relevant student projects, including Multimodal Context-Aware Suspicious Activity Detection, Automated Irrigation Systems, 3D Building Construction Models, Reliable Medical Image Segmentation, Adaptive Conversational AI, Automatic Vehicle Detection and Monitoring, AR Glasses for Dyslexic Individuals etc. Additionally, I’ve successfully secured funding from the Karnataka State Council for Science and Technology (KSCST) to support impactful student projects and research initiatives. My professional journey is driven by a strong passion for creating interdisciplinary, real-world learning experiences and for leveraging emerging technologies to solve meaningful societal problems.

raw.About: Dr. Richa Sharma worked as an Assistant Professor at PES University, T John College, Bangalore, and PCTE Group of Institutes, Ludhiana. She holds a master's degree in technology (M. Tech) and master’s and bachelor’s degrees in computer applications (MCA, BCA). With nine years of experience in teaching and training MCA, MBA, and B.E. students, her interests lie in researching new technologies, teaching, and mentoring to help groom new talent with the required skillset. She has publications in various national and international conferences and journals of repute. With a PhD in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), specializing in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning/Deep Learning (ML/DL), she is currently an Associate Professor at PES University, Bangalore. Her primary research focus is on Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models, Retrieval Augmented Generation etc. —areas she has long been passionate about and where she finds immense excitement in applying these technologies to tackle significant challenges in the digital landscape. During her PhD, she conducted pioneering research in fake news detection, particularly in the Hindi language. In addition to her research, she has mentored numerous projects, resulting in the publication of several papers in respected conferences and journals, thereby contributing to the academic community and advancing the field.

He has over 17 years of Industry experience, worked is companies like Sanyo LSI, Wipro, KPIT Cummins and Sankalp semiconductors and Aplab. He has over 30 publications in journals and conferences. His area of interest is Analog VLSI, device modelling, circuit optimization, biomedical signal processing and sensor interface. He is senior member IEEE and advisor to IEEE Solid State circuits student chapter.

raw.About: A passionate Teacher, started Teaching as a career in 1989 in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering in P D A College of Engineering, Gulbarga. Was fortunate to pursue PhD under the able Guidance of Prof. B N Chatterji, E&ECE Department, IIT Kharagpur. Prof. B N Chatterji is one of the Pioneers and first few for initiating research in Image Processing in India. Apart from Teaching, Research interests include Image Processing, Control Systems, blending Vedic Maths into Technology. Administrative experience include 6 years in Heading Engineering Institution as Principal at Jayaprakash Narayan College of Engineering, Mahabubnagar. Department Head in PESIT Bangalore South Campus since 2012. Have deep interests in rendering Scientific Insights to Spirituality. Being Disciple of Spiritual Master H H Sri Sri Ravi Shankar and Ambassador of Peace, have been senior faculty in The Art of Living (Volunteer Organization), spreading the ancient wisdom of India and conducting Healing Breath workshops across communities.

raw.About: Dr Rupa Sarkar is a faculty of Quantitative Techniques, Business Economics and Marketing Research at the Department of Management and Commerce, PES University of Bangalore. Her areas of expertise include Mathematical Economics, Econometrics, Health Economics, Behavioural Economics. Dr Sarkar's work has been 1ed at respected peer-reviewed journals, such as Journal of Health Management, Indian Journal of Health Research and Development and Indian Journal of Community Health. She has been selected to present her research at top national accounting conferences, including the Indian Association for Research in National Income and Wealth. Her Doctoral Degree is from Department of Economics, supervised by Dr Mahesh E, Christ University, Bangalore, overseen and evaluated by Dr K. Gayithri, Professor, Centre for Economic Studies and Policy, ISEC, Bangalore. Dr Sarkar also has a Master's Degree in the Discipline of Education from the School of Education, Christ University, Bangalore. She has contributed in the field of Education through Scopus indexed journal publications, UGC Journal publications, book chapters and research presentations in National and International conferences. Before joining PES University, Dr Sarkar was working in Christ University, Bangalore. Dr Sarkar has a rich teaching experience of more than 7 years and she has taught over 30 papers in Economics and Education.

raw.Additional Information: Dr. Kumar Raja N.P. is a distinguished academician and research scholar with over 25 years of experience in higher education, spanning teaching, academic administration, research, and institutional development. He currently serves as Professor in the Faculty of Management & Commerce at PES University, Bangalore. He holds a Ph.D. in Management from Sri Krishnadevaraya University and is also an APSET-qualified faculty member. His academic interests lie in Marketing Management, Finance, and Human Resource Management, and he has delivered courses in key areas such as Brand Management, Business Law, Corporate Governance, and Financial Accounting. Dr. Raja has a prolific research and publication record, with over 30 research papers published in SCOPUS, UGC-CARE, and peer-reviewed journals. He has authored/co-authored five academic books, contributed content for S.K. University’s Distance Education program, and served as an editor and reviewer for international journals. He is also the Associate Editor of the international peer-reviewed book “Recent Trends in Economics, Banking, Commerce & Management” (Red Shine Publications, 2023). In addition to his teaching and research work, Dr. Raja has been instrumental in several institutional development initiatives. He has led NAAC accreditation teams, helped secure CBSE affiliation for educational institutions, and has organized numerous FDPs, seminars, and student development programs. A committed advocate of community service, he has coordinated 120+ free eye operation camps in partnership with Shankara Eye Hospital, Bangalore. Dr. Raja is an active member of professional organizations including AIMA, and regularly participates in national and international academic forums. His leadership in placement coordination, curriculum development, and industry-academia collaboration has made significant contributions to enhancing the employability and practical learning experiences of management students.
raw.About: Dr. Kumar Raja N.P. is a distinguished academician and seasoned professional in the field of Management and Commerce with over 25 years of comprehensive experience in teaching, research, administration, and institutional development. His career reflects a deep commitment to fostering academic excellence, mentoring future leaders, and bridging the gap between academia and industry. Currently serving as a Professor at PES University, Bangalore, Dr. Raja has held esteemed positions at several reputed institutions, including Associate Professor roles at Kristu Jayanti College and Professor at SDGS College, Hindupur, where he also served as Vice Principal. He began his academic journey at Balayesu Degree & PG College, Hindupur, playing a pivotal role in developing and leading the BBM and M.Com departments. Dr. Raja holds a Ph.D. in Management from S.K. University and has further strengthened his academic foundation with an M.B.A., M.Com, M.Phil., and APSET qualification in Commerce . His areas of expertise span Marketing Management, Finance, and Human Resource Management, and he has consistently delivered impactful lectures and courses across these domains. An ardent researcher, Dr. Raja has guided over 500 UG and PG student research projects and published more than 30 scholarly articles in SCOPUS-indexed and UGC-CARE-listed journals. He has also authored and co-authored five academic books, contributed to curriculum development, and participated in national and international conferences, including those hosted by IITs and IIMs. His academic contributions include being an appointed lesson writer for S.K. University’s Distance Education Program and an editorial board member for peer-reviewed journals. Beyond academics, Dr. Raja has made significant contributions to institutional development—leading NAAC accreditation teams, securing CBSE affiliation for schools, organizing CSR initiatives such as 120+ free eye operation camps, and spearheading job fairs and campus recruitment programs. His passion for student success and social upliftment is evident through his engagement in entrepreneurship training and faculty development programs. Dr. Kumar Raja N.P. is not only a scholar and teacher but also a visionary leader whose dynamic approach to education continues to inspire students, peers, and institutions alike.

raw.About: As a seasoned banking professional with over 23 years of extensive experience in the financial sector, specializing in Risk Management across both public and foreign banks, I have a strong expertise in Credit, Market, and Operational Risk. I have played a pivotal role in shaping risk frameworks, ensuring regulatory compliance, and fostering a robust risk culture within organizations. Throughout my career, I have conducted comprehensive risk assessments, developed insightful risk reports, and presented key findings to senior management to drive strategic decision-making. Apart from this corporate experience, I have always been passionate about teaching and knowledge sharing. Even while working in the banking sector, I was actively involved in training and development programs, conducting sessions at staff training centers on various banking and risk management topics. This passion for education led to my transition into academia, where I am now serving as a Professor of Practice in the Faculty of Management and Commerce in our esteemed PES University.

name: Dr. Gajanan V Honnavar
text: Name: Dr. Gajanan V Honnavar | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: EC | Research: Electrical and Optical properties of Amorphous Materials: The main challenge in investigating any amorphous material is their non-periodic nature. Never the less, the local structure or short-range structure resembles their crystalline counter parts. I use various spectroscopic techniques like: Raman, IR, EPR/NMR to first investigate the local /short-range structure and then try to correlate th i) Vanadium based glasses: Vanadium shows a variety of oxidation sates which is of interest for various technological applications. In glasses usually it shows 4+ and 5+ states which is exploited for switching and polaronic conduction. I am interested in doping the vanadate glasses with various alkali ions and check their suitability in battery materials, super capacitors etc. ii)Tellurium based glasses: Tellurium based materials are most sought-after in optical engineering / photonic applications due to its high refractive index, low phonon energy. I am interested in novel optical properties shown by these class of glasses after doping with rare-earth ions. I try to correlate the optical properties to change in the local environment and exploit it. iii)Conducting polymer Nano composite: This is mostly a collaborative work. I collaborate with Prof. Raghu Menon�s lab at Dept. of Physics, IISc. We investigate the transport and structure of the thin films of conducting polymer composites. | Expertise/Teaching: Undergraduate courses: General Physics, Engineering Physics, Quantum Mechanics, Electromagnetism, Solid-State Physics, Nano-Electronics, Physics of Electronic devices, Optical fiber communication, Engineering Physics Lab. Masters courses: Graduate Quantum Mechanics, Electrodynamics, Advanced Physics Lab. Doctoral courses: Special topics in Solid-State Physics (Experimental Techniques and analysis), Computational Physics using Python. Supervised several undergraduate, master and doctoral theses Member of three doctoral committe | Active Projects: Investigation on Li-ion motion and local structure in lithium vanadate glasses for possible battery material was awarded a grant of 40 lakh INR by Vision Group of Science and Technology (VGST), Govt. of Karnataka Compleated 2025 Electrical Noise-based Quantum Random Number Generator using Quantum Dots. 8.5 Lakh rupees Q-PARK IISc, Awarded 2025 compleated Feb 2026 | Responsibilities: Mentor for gifted student development program as well as weak student support program. Served as a Deputy Chief of Exams (VTU) at PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore south campus Served as Chairman of the Exam Squad team (VTU) Served as Resource person for the High school teachers training programme conducted regularly by IISc at Challekere campus. I have had a short stint at the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore as a research student. Recently I was at Bahir Dar University, Bahir Dar, Ethiopia on sabbatical to promote Solid State Physics-related research activities. raw.name: Dr. Gajanan V Honnavar
raw.title: Professor
raw.Education: Ph.D., Indian Institute of Science , Bangalore, 2016 M.Sc., Karnatak University, Dharwad, 1999 B.Sc., Karnatak University , Dharwad, 1997
raw.Experience: Associate professor of Physics ( as sabbatical from 09-12-2017 to 14-04-2021), Bahir Dar University, Bahir Dar, Ethiopia, 2017 - 2021 Assistant professor of Physics, PES Institute of Technology-Bangalore South Campus,Bangalore,, 2011 - 2016 Lecturer in Physics, PES Institute of Technology-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, 2005 - 2011 Lecturer in Physics, MVJ College of Engineering, Bangalore, 2002 - 2005
raw.Additional Information: I have designed and taught several courses to undergraduate, master, and doctoral students. My main research interest is in electrical and optical properties of glasses, conductive polymers, quantum dots and nano-composites. I use various spectroscopic techniques to correlate the structure and these properties Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=93Z4-nIAAAAJ&hl=en Drop an e-mail to inquire about a summer internship, research assistant, or Ph.D. position.
raw.Achievements: Certificate by Elsevier in recognition to the outstanding contribution towards reviewing for the Journal of Non-Crystalline Solids Recognition for getting best results consistently at PES Institute of Technology from 2007 onwards Best teacher award at MVJ College of Engineering. Recognized Referee for Science Direct Journals - Journal of Non-Crystalline Solids (JNCS) - a prestigious journal for glasses and ceramics, Solid State Ionics and IOP journal Materials Research Express KFIST L2 grant from Vision Group of Science and Technology (VGST), Govt. of Karnataka ( 40 lakh INR) 2018
raw.Teaching: Undergraduate courses: General Physics, Engineering Physics, Quantum Mechanics, Electromagnetism, Solid-State Physics, Nano-Electronics, Physics of Electronic devices, Optical fiber communication, Engineering Physics Lab. Masters courses: Graduate Quantum Mechanics, Electrodynamics, Advanced Physics Lab. Doctoral courses: Special topics in Solid-State Physics (Experimental Techniques and analysis), Computational Physics using Python. Supervised several undergraduate, master and doctoral theses Member of three doctoral committe
raw.Responsibilities: Mentor for gifted student development program as well as weak student support program. Served as a Deputy Chief of Exams (VTU) at PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore south campus Served as Chairman of the Exam Squad team (VTU) Served as Resource person for the High school teachers training programme conducted regularly by IISc at Challekere campus. Team Leader of Quantum and Nano Devices (QuNaD) Lab
raw.Research Guidance: Mr. Belay Getachew Hailemariam graduated from Bahir Dar University, Bahir Dar, Ethiopia on 15th July 2021. Mrs Parul Goel graduated from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) Belagavi, India on 1st August 2023. Mr. Afrash Ejigu graduated from Bahir Dar University, Bahir Dar, Ethiopia on 15th October 2023 Masters (Supervised) 1. Anusha (2012) 2. Analysis of neodymium-doped telluro-cadmium glass for photonic application, Department of Physics, Bahir Dar University, Ethiopia, Student - MogesTsega (2019). 3. Study of Structural and Magnetic Properties of ZnO quantum dot doped Nickel ferrite, Department of Physics, Bahir Dar University, Ethiopia, Student Mengistu (2019).
raw.Research Interest: Electrical and Optical properties of Amorphous Materials: The main challenge in investigating any amorphous material is their non-periodic nature. Never the less, the local structure or short-range structure resembles their crystalline counter parts. I use various spectroscopic techniques like: Raman, IR, EPR/NMR to first investigate the local /short-range structure and then try to correlate th i) Vanadium based glasses: Vanadium shows a variety of oxidation sates which is of interest for various technological applications. In glasses usually it shows 4+ and 5+ states which is exploited for switching and polaronic conduction. I am interested in doping the vanadate glasses with various alkali ions and check their suitability in battery materials, super capacitors etc. ii)Tellurium based glasses: Tellurium based materials are most sought-after in optical engineering / photonic applications due to its high refractive index, low phonon energy. I am interested in novel optical properties shown by these class of glasses after doping with rare-earth ions. I try to correlate the optical properties to change in the local environment and exploit it. iii)Conducting polymer Nano composite: This is mostly a collaborative work. I collaborate with Prof. Raghu Menon�s lab at Dept. of Physics, IISc. We investigate the transport and structure of the thin films of conducting polymer composites.
raw.Research Projects: Investigation on Li-ion motion and local structure in lithium vanadate glasses for possible battery material was awarded a grant of 40 lakh INR by Vision Group of Science and Technology (VGST), Govt. of Karnataka Compleated 2025 Electrical Noise-based Quantum Random Number Generator using Quantum Dots. 8.5 Lakh rupees Q-PARK IISc, Awarded 2025 compleated Feb 2026

raw.About: A native of Gokarna, a scenic town of coastal Karnataka, I have been with PES since 2005. I have had a short stint at the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore as a research student. Recently I was at Bahir Dar University, Bahir Dar, Ethiopia on sabbatical to promote Solid State Physics-related research activities. I have more than two decades of experience in teaching graduate and undergraduate Physics and related subjects. I am an active researcher in the field of experimental condensed matter physics with more than a decade of research experience.

raw.name: Dr. Revanasiddappa M
raw.title: Professor
raw.Education: M.Sc.,, Gulbarga University Gulbarga, 1999 M.Phil.,, Gulbarga University Gulbarga, 2000 Ph.D.,, Gulbarga University Gulbarga, 2006
raw.Experience: Professor, PES University Electronic campus, 2016 - Till date Associate Professor, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, 2011 - 2016 Assistant professor, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, 2006 - 2011 Lecturer, GM Institute of Technology, Davanagere, 2004 - 2006 Guest Lecturer, Department of Chemistry, Gulbarga University, Gulbarga, 2000 - 2004
raw.Achievements: RULA INTERNATIONAL RESEARCH RATNA AWARD Received on 26th Febraury 2019 at Trichy. FIRST Rank with Gold medal at M.Sc. (Inorganic Chemistry) for securing highest marks BEST POSTER AWARD, for the paper presentation in the National conference on Advanced Recent Science, Engineering and Management (NCARSEM-18), held at PESITM, Shivamogga, on 26th May 2018. Got first prize for paper presentation in National conference on Sustainable Engineering and Management held at The Oxford College of Engineering, Bangalore 24-25th May 2018. Got second prize for poster presentation in National conference on Sustainable Engineering and Management held at The Oxford College of Engineering, Bangalore 24-25th May 2018. Got 2 best paper awards, in 4th national conference on Recent Innovation on Science and Engineering held at PESIT-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore 6thMay 2018. Got 2 best paper awards, in National conference on Sustainable Engineering and Management held at The Oxford College of Engineering, Bangalore 26-27th May 2017. Got 2 best paper awards, in 3rd national conference on Recent Innovation on Science and Engineering held at PESIT-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore 6thMay 2017. Got 2 best paper awards, in 2ndnational conference on Recent Innovation on Science and Engineering held at PESIT-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore 2nd May 2016. BEST POSTER AWARD, for the paper presentation in the National conference on Recent Advances and Applied Science, held at AMC Engineering College, Bangalore on 25th April 2016 Got 2 best paper awards, in national conference on Recent Innovation on Science and Engineering held at PESIT-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore 2nd May 2015. Got first 1st prize for paper presentation in two days national conference on Innovative Research Materials held at Christ College, Bangalore, November 14-15th 2014. Got Second prize in 3rd International Conference on Recent Advances in Material Processing Technology (RAMPT?13) held at Kovilpatti, Tamilnadu 6-8th January, 2013. Got 2 best paper awards, for papers presented at the Knowledge Utsav, held at Jain University, Bangalore, 28th August 2010.
raw.Teaching: General / Polymer/ Inorganic Chemistry/Environmental Science Organometallic Chemistry Analytical Instrumentation General / Polymer/ Inorganic Chemistry/Environmental Science Structural Biology Biochemistry Engineering Chemistry
raw.Responsibilities: Anchor Teacher for Engineering Chemistry in PES University during 2019-20. Board of Studies Member (Engineering Chemistry) of SDM College of Engineering and Technology Dharwad from April 2018-April 2020. Deputy Chief Superintendent (External) for VTU Examinations, BTL Institute of Technology, Bangalore Deputy Chief Superintendent (External) for VTU Examinations, Bangalore College of Engineering, Chandrapur, Bangalore Deputy Chief Superintendent for VTU Examinations, PES School of Engineering. Bangalore Key player for ISO Certification, GM Institute of Technology, Davanagere Test Coordinator at PESIT-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore
raw.Research Guidance: Ph.D. is awarded to Mr. Doopadahalli Siddalinga Swamy, titled Synthesis, Characterization, Transport Properties of Conducting Polymer Composites and Its Applications on 28-12-2015, from chemistry Research center, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus. Ph.D. is awarded to Mrs Smita D Revankar, titled Synthesis Characterization and Biological Studies on some Coordination Metal Complexes on 19-08-2017, from chemistry Research center, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus Ph.D is awarded to Mr Sankranthi Shreenivas titled Studies on Development of Sensitive Spectrophotometric and Chromatographic Methods for the Analysis of Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient In Drugs on 14-10-2017, from chemistry Research center, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus. Ph.D is awarded to Mrs Jyoti C Ajbani titled Spectrochemical and Microbial Studies On Some Coordination Metal Complexes on 14-10-2018, from chemistry Research center, PESIT, Bangalore South Campus.
raw.Research Interest: Study of Electric and Magnetic properties in conducting polymer composites Study of Humidity and Gas Sensor properties of conducting polymer composites Study of EMI Shielding effectiveness of conducting polymer composites Beneficiation of Fly Ash at low and Microwave Frequency region Low Frequency Conductivity, Impedance and Dielectric studies of Polymer Composites.
raw.Research Projects: Principal Investigator in ongoing research project Electromagnetic Shielding Interference (EMI-SE) measurement set up Funding agency Vision Group on Science and Technology, Government of Karnataka, Bangalore Cost 20.00 lakhs

name: Dr. Muhammad Faisal
text: Name: Dr. Muhammad Faisal | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: EC | Research: Conducting polymers and conducting polymer composites. Synthesis, characterization and analysis of low frequency transport and dielectric properties. Microwave property studies, especially analysis of Electromagnetic interference (EMI) shielding and dielectric attributes. Sensors based on conducting polymer composites. Conducting polymer/graphene composites for electronic applications. Electromagnetic properties of fly ash. Multifunctional composite materials. | Expertise/Teaching: Engineering Physics | Responsibilities: Department Digital Coordinator Faculty Advisor & Mentor Subject Anchor & Co-Anchor Class Coordinator Internal Assessment Test Coordinator | Bio: Muhammad Faisal obtained PhD degree in 2014 from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Karnataka, India and MSc degree in 2004 from Mahatma Gandhi University, Kerala, India. He is currently working as Associate Professor of Physics at PES University-Electronic City Campus, Bangalore, India. His research interests include synthesis and characterization of conducting polymer nanocomposites for various technological applications like EMI shielding, sensors and understanding the in-depth transport mechanism. | Career History: Associate Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES University-Electronic City Campus, Bangalore, India, 2018 - to date Associate Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES Institute of Technology-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, India, 2015 - 2018 Assistant Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES Institute of Technology-Bangalor... | Success: BSc (Bachelor of Science) First Rank Best Presentation Award for the paper Absorption of Broadband Electromagnetic Waves by Polyaniline-coated Barium Ferrite Nanocomposites, International Conference (on-line) on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics, Telecommunications, Instrumentation Engg., Medical Electronics and Physics (IC RTEETIMP-2020), 7-9 December 2020 organized by Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, Bangalore, India. Best paper award for the work EMI Shielding properties of Polyaniline MWNT composites, at Knowledge Utsav, organized by the Jain University, Bangalore, India. Best paper award for the guided Student Project on Effective Humidity Sensor Based on Conducting Polymer Nano-Composites, at @ Make in India National Level Paper Presentation Contest conducted by Project Council, Government of India (ECI Initiative) on 19th November, 2016 at Sathyabama University, Tamil Nadu, India. Ph.D. Thesis selected for Thesis Award at 59th DAE (Department of Atomic Energy)-SSPS (Solid State Physics Symposium)-2014 held at VIT University, Vellore, Tamil Nadu, India, during December 16-20, 2014. | Recent Pubs: Madhusudhan C.K, Mahendra K, Narasimha Raghavendra, Revanasiddappa M and Muhammad Faisal, Corrosion resistant Polypyrrole-Banana Carbon (PPy-BC) nanocomposites for protection against electromagnetic interference: A green approach, J Mater Sci : Mater Electron, (2021) 1-17. raw.name: Dr. Muhammad Faisal
raw.title: Associate Professor
raw.Education: PhD, Visvesvaraya Technological University, Karnataka, 2014 MSc, Mahatma Gandhi University, Kerala, 2004
raw.Experience: Associate Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES University-Electronic City Campus, Bangalore, India, 2018 - to date Associate Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES Institute of Technology-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, India, 2015 - 2018 Assistant Professor of Physics, Department of Science & Humanities at PES Institute of Technology-Bangalore South Campus, Bangalore, India, 2011 - 2015
raw.Achievements: BSc (Bachelor of Science) First Rank Best Presentation Award for the paper Absorption of Broadband Electromagnetic Waves by Polyaniline-coated Barium Ferrite Nanocomposites, International Conference (on-line) on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics, Telecommunications, Instrumentation Engg., Medical Electronics and Physics (IC RTEETIMP-2020), 7-9 December 2020 organized by Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, Bangalore, India. Best paper award for the work EMI Shielding properties of Polyaniline MWNT composites, at Knowledge Utsav, organized by the Jain University, Bangalore, India. Best paper award for the guided Student Project on Effective Humidity Sensor Based on Conducting Polymer Nano-Composites, at @ Make in India National Level Paper Presentation Contest conducted by Project Council, Government of India (ECI Initiative) on 19th November, 2016 at Sathyabama University, Tamil Nadu, India. Ph.D. Thesis selected for Thesis Award at 59th DAE (Department of Atomic Energy)-SSPS (Solid State Physics Symposium)-2014 held at VIT University, Vellore, Tamil Nadu, India, during December 16-20, 2014.
raw.Teaching: Engineering Physics
raw.Responsibilities: Department Digital Coordinator Faculty Advisor & Mentor Subject Anchor & Co-Anchor Class Coordinator Internal Assessment Test Coordinator
raw.Research Guidance: Guiding 3 Research Scholars under Visvesvaraya Technological University, Karnataka.
raw.Research Interest: Conducting polymers and conducting polymer composites. Synthesis, characterization and analysis of low frequency transport and dielectric properties. Microwave property studies, especially analysis of Electromagnetic interference (EMI) shielding and dielectric attributes. Sensors based on conducting polymer composites. Conducting polymer/graphene composites for electronic applications. Electromagnetic properties of fly ash. Multifunctional composite materials.

raw.About: Muhammad Faisal obtained PhD degree in 2014 from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Karnataka, India and MSc degree in 2004 from Mahatma Gandhi University, Kerala, India. He is currently working as Associate Professor of Physics at PES University-Electronic City Campus, Bangalore, India. His research interests include synthesis and characterization of conducting polymer nanocomposites for various technological applications like EMI shielding, sensors and understanding the in-depth transport mechanism.

raw.About: I’m Dr. Tania Bose, a passionate mathematician and educator with a Ph.D. from Panjab University, Chandigarh, where my research focused on mathematical modeling of creep in composite materials for engineering applications. My academic journey began with a B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics from Panjab University, followed by a Ph.D. completed in 2018. I earned JRF and SRF from CSIR, New Delhi to persue PhD. As an active researcher, I’ve published extensively in high-impact journals like the European Journal of Mechanics and International Journal of Applied Mechanics and hold 20 patents including design and utility, showcasing my innovative spirit. My teaching experience spans over 15 years across diverse institutions and it’s been an awesome journey. I joined as an Associate Professor in PES University, RR Campus in May 2025. Before that, I was serving as a Professor at Chitkara University, Punjab, following my time as an Associate Professor there from 2019 to 2022. Before that, I was an Assistant Professor at Chitkara University from 2010 to 2014 and a Lecturer at G.G.S. College of Modern Technology, Kharar, from 2006 to 2010. During my Ph.D., I taught as a Research Scholar and later as a Guest Lecturer at the University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Panjab University, from 2014 to 2019. My teaching covers a broad spectrum of mathematical disciplines like Engineering Maths and Discrete Maths. I was consecutively the unit chair for 5 years in a twin program run by Deakin University, Australia. I have conducted several workshops on Vedic Maths, Latex writing and MATLAB. My efforts have been recognized with awards like the Best Oral Presentation at Chandigarh Science Congress and research awards presented by Panjab University for publishing papers in high impact journals.

name: Dr. Anuradha Bhattacharjee
text: Name: Dr. Anuradha Bhattacharjee | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: EC | Research: Epidemiology | Bio: Dr. Anuradha Bhattacharjee is an Assistant Professor in Mathematics. She has a PhD degree from Dibrugarh University on “Mathematical Modelling of Transmission Dynamics and Control of Infectious Diseases”. She has 12.5 years of teaching and 2.5 years of industry experience. She has an experience of teaching at UG and PG levels. She has 14 publications in international and national journals. Her area of interest is Epidemiology.

raw.About: I am an academician and researcher specializing in advanced manufacturing techniques, particularly in the Ultrashort pulse (Femtosecond) laser micro-machining process. With over six years of teaching experience and a robust research background, I have contributed extensively to reputed international journals. I got awarded Ph.D. degree from the National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli. My professional experience includes working as a Mechanical Engineer at a multinational company in Pune, followed by a research intern at the Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO), Trivandrum. My core expertise encompasses laser micro-drilling of high-temperature resistant materials, thermal barrier coating, fixture development, and geometric dimensioning. I am dedicated to mentoring students and translating research into practical engineering applications.

Linear Algebra and Optimization Technique for B.Tech and M.Tech. | Bio: Dr. Komala B has been teaching for fifteen years and is presently an assistant professor teaching Mathematics in the Department of Science and Humanities at PES University. She obtained her bachelor's degree from Vijaya College of Bangalore University, her master's degree from Bangalore University, and her doctorate in mathematics with a focus on fluid dynamics from Bharathiar University in Tamil Nadu. She actively participates in national and international scientific events, and her significant research contributions have been published in peer-reviewed journals. Her research interests include fluid mechanics, numerical methods, and differential equations. | Career History: Assistant Professor, Department of Science & Humanities, PES University, August 2022 - till date. name: Swetha N
text: Name: Swetha N | Department: Science & Humanities | Campus: EC | Research: Nano composite materials, Electrochemical studies, Photocatalytic studies and Anti Oxidant studies. | Expertise/Teaching: Engineering Chemistry. | Responsibilities: Class coordinator ( P-Section) and Mentor | Bio: I am an academician and researcher specializing in nanocomposite materials, with a particular focus on the extraction of silica from agricultural waste. With 16 years of teaching and 4years of research experience, I have contributed to several national and international journals. I am currently pursuing my Ph.D. at Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU), Belagavi, Karnataka. raw.About: Dr. K.Lakshman, is working as a Professor and Chairperson, Department of Pharmacognosy, at PESU Institute of Pharmacy. He received his Ph.D.(Pharmaceutical Sciences) from Jadavpur University, Kolkata, under QIP-AICTE. He is a Top Researcher who landed in the AD Scientific Index 2023 Scientists Rankings, based on total H-Index 23. He received Young Scientist award by A.P.Medicinal Plants Board (APMPB ) in 2008. He published more than 70 research articles in various National and International reputed Journals with good impact factor. He has guided many graduate and post graduate students. Currently he is guiding 3 Ph.D students. His research interest is on Scientific validation of Medicinal plants of Traditional importance.

name: Dr. Satish C S
text: Name: Dr. Satish C S | Department: Pharmaceutical Sciences | Campus: EC | Research: • Implants • Hydrogels • Novel delivery of Herbal actives | Expertise/Teaching: • Teaching Master of Pharmacy since 2007 and Bachelor of Pharmacy since 1999, Doctor of Pharmacy since 2009. | Active Projects: Organic nanocomposite band-aid containing carboxymethyl-chitosan nanoparticles of Asiaticoside for wound healing | Responsibilities: •Faculty Adviser-M.Pharm • Research Coordinator • Anchor teacher-Biopharmaceutics and Pharmacokinetics-M.Pharm. • Doctoral Committee Member | Bio: Dr. Satish C S is working as a Professor and HOD of the Department of Pharmaceutics at PESU Institute of Pharmacy. His academic qualifications include a Ph.D. in Pharmaceutics from JSS College of Pharmacy, Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Bangalore, with a UGC-funded major project. He is actively conducting research in his field of specialization, focusing on polymer synthesis, characterization, and evaluation, as well as the development of parenteral controlled release systems and anticancer drug delivery systems. His research also encompasses biocompatibility studies. | Career History: Lecturer, M.S. raw.About: Dr. Satish C S is working as a Professor and HOD of the Department of Pharmaceutics at PESU Institute of Pharmacy. His academic qualifications include a Ph.D. in Pharmaceutics from JSS College of Pharmacy, Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Bangalore, with a UGC-funded major project. He is actively conducting research in his field of specialization, focusing on polymer synthesis, characterization, and evaluation, as well as the development of parenteral controlled release systems and anticancer drug delivery systems. His research also encompasses biocompatibility studies.

raw.About: With over 27 years of academic and research experience in pharmaceutical sciences, he has significantly contributed to pharmacy education, particularly in the domains of Clinical Pharmacy, Pharmacotherapeutics, Clinical Pharmacokinetics, and Pharmacy Practice Research. He has served as Chairperson and Pharm.D Program Coordinator and played an instrumental role in curriculum development, regulatory compliance, and academic quality assurance. His leadership has fostered collaborations with national and international institutions, notably Griffith University, Australia, and he has successfully guided 18 M.Pharm. and 46 Pharm.D research projects. His research interests span Novel Drug Delivery Systems, Clinical Pharmacy Practices, Pharmacovigilance, and the application of digital health technologies in patient care. He has published over 50 peer-reviewed papers in reputed journals and actively contributes as an examiner, research mentor, and quality assurance leader within the pharmacy education community. He is also recognised for integrating innovative teaching methodologies, including simulation-based learning and digital tools for healthcare education. Recent Publications Highlights: - Journal of Clinical Oncology (IF 41.9) - Emergency Care Journal (Q4) - Prospects in Pharmaceutical Sciences (Q3) - Indian Journal of Pharmacy Practice

text: Name: Dr. Saniya Jawed | Department: Pharmaceutical Sciences | Campus: EC | Research: Chronotherapeutics, 3D printing, vesicular drug delivery system, novel DDS, BCS classification of drug prediction, drug-drug interaction prediction, | Expertise/Teaching: Pharmaceutics, Physical Pharmaceutics, Industrial Pharmacy, Jurisprudence, Cosmetics, Formulations for UG students Molecular Pharmaceutics, Modern Pharmaceutics, Cosmeceuticals to PG students | Active Projects: PESU IRF project (11 lacs) on "Design and Development of DMARDs encapsulated niosome for Rheumatoid arthritis targeted therapy" as PI | Responsibilities: NAAC Coordinator, PESU Institute of Pharmacy, EC Campus, PES University Capstone Project Coordinator, PESU Institute of Pharmacy, PES University, EC Campus Socioholics Club incharge of PESU Institute of Pharmacy, PES University, EC campus | Bio: Dr. Saniya Jawed is affiliated with the PESU Institute of Pharmacy, PES University, where she works as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Pharmaceutics. She has published national and international publications and currently working as a reviewer for reputed journals. Her research interest involves Chronotherapeutics, Early morning pathologies, and 3D printing. | Career History: Assistant Professor, PESU Institute of Pharmacy, PES Univeristy, 2023 - Till date Assistant Professor, PES College of Pharmacy, RGUHS, 2015 - 2017 Full-time Research Scholar, PES University, 2020 - 2023 | Success: • Completed Full-time Ph.D. in 3 years and 6 months. • Awarded as NPTEL star discipline for July – Dec 2021 session | Recent Pubs: Journal of Pharmaceutical Innovation (Springer, 2025): “Bioanalytical Method Development, Pharmacokinetic Determination, and Time-Dependent Mobility of a Novel Chronosystem of ACE Inhibitor” (Impact Factor: 2.7) Annals of 3D Printed Medicine (Elsevier, 2024): “Novel 3D printed capsule as an auxiliary enteric-coating for gastroprotective drug delivery” (CiteScore: 4.7) Future Journal of Pharmaceutical Sciences (Springer, 2023): “IVIVC assessment, Pharmacokinetic evaluation, and X-ray radiography mapping of a Novel Parteck® SRP 80 and Hypromellose loaded LTD4 receptor antagonist chronosystem” (Impact Factor: 2.7) Drug Development and Industrial Pharmacy (Taylor & Francis, 2023): “Exploration of Polymethacrylate and Hypromellose for the Development of a non-sulfhydryl ACE inhibitor mucoadhesive system using Box-Behnken Design: in-vitro and ex-vivo Evaluation” (Impact Factor: 3.73) AAPS PharmaSciTech (Springer, 2022): “Exploration of Parteck® SRP 80 and Hypromellose for chronomodulated release of LTD4 receptor antagonist and statistical optimization using Central Composite Design” (Impact Factor: 4.03) IJPR (Scopus Indexed): Chrono-therapeutics: Recent advances and development (IF: 0.481)

raw.About: Dr. Saniya Jawed is affiliated with the PESU Institute of Pharmacy, PES University, where she works as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Pharmaceutics. She has published national and international publications and currently working as a reviewer for reputed journals. Her research interest involves Chronotherapeutics, Early morning pathologies, and 3D printing.

name: Dr. Varsha Iranna Dalal
text: Name: Dr. Varsha Iranna Dalal | Department: Pharmaceutical Sciences | Campus: EC | Expertise/Teaching: Pathophysiology,Pharmacotherapeutics-III, Clinical Pharmacokinetics and Therapeutic Drug Monitoring and Pharmacovigilance | Active Projects: Drug utilization evaluation of proton pump inhibitors in surgery department at tertiary care teaching hospital. | Responsibilities: Scholarship coordinator Class Teacher Faculty Adviser | Bio: As an Assistant Professor in the Pharm.D and B.Pharm program, I bring a passion for advancing pharmaceutical care in infectious diseases. My research interests span clinical trials, therapeutic drug monitoring, and pharmacoeconomic analysis, with a focus on optimizing patient outcomes. I am also dedicated to exploring the intersection of pharmacoepidemiology and public health policy.With a strong background in pharmacy practice and education, I strive to inspire and mentor future pharmacists in evidence-based practice and research. My goal is to contribute to the development of innovative treatment strategies and healthcare solutions that improve patient care and reduce healthcare costs. | Career History: Assistant Professor, KLE College of Pharmacy, Hubbali, 2018 - 2023 Assistant Professor, PES Institute of Pharmacy, Bengaluru, 2023 - Till date

raw.Research Guidance: 1. The Pharmacoeconomic Impact Of Gastro-Protective Agents At A Tertiary Care Hospital 2. Prescription Pattern Analysis Of Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs In Tertiary Care Hospital. 3. Assessment of medication adherence and identification of drug related problems in patients with CKD 4. Efficacy of Sublingual Immunotherapy (SLIT) in insect allergy associated Allergic Rhinitis patients and impact of patient counselling on insect allergy associated Allergic Rhinitis patients who have discontinued SLIT. 5. A questionnaire based survey to assess the level of knowledge and awareness about drug-food interactions among students of healthcare preofessionals. 6. Modular web designing on use of medical devices 7. Public, Pharmacist, and Physician’s views on Over the Counter drugs: A comparative Analysis.
raw.Research Projects: Drug utilization evaluation of proton pump inhibitors in surgery department at tertiary care teaching hospital.

raw.About: As an Assistant Professor in the Pharm.D and B.Pharm program, I bring a passion for advancing pharmaceutical care in infectious diseases. My research interests span clinical trials, therapeutic drug monitoring, and pharmacoeconomic analysis, with a focus on optimizing patient outcomes. I am also dedicated to exploring the intersection of pharmacoepidemiology and public health policy.With a strong background in pharmacy practice and education, I strive to inspire and mentor future pharmacists in evidence-based practice and research. My goal is to contribute to the development of innovative treatment strategies and healthcare solutions that improve patient care and reduce healthcare costs.
